          26.Astarion: Even though they were an awful lot of fun?

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 07915fb8-b184-2335-117a-f0c23908e879Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h1caef0a2g2a0cg48f8g901fg99ac799c2bc1Text UUID: 190fcbc0-5190-4ae1-a19c-c53e3e389ecdTimeline Phase Index: 193Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 07915fb8-b184-2335-117a-f0c23908e879Timeline Phase Duration: 3.66sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
          • +
            561.Player: I want to be with Gale, I'm sorry.!ORI_State_DatingAstarion

            Flags and Tags

            settype Object | speaker 1 Player
            • ORI_State_DatingAstarion {ba298c56-26b6-4918-9bd4-616668d369d8} = False

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a629c2bc-d7bf-2874-f805-dbd98b44608fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h8d8be0d2g4568g418fg8503g3f4e2a053fb4Text UUID: 573f0d44-7cbd-4c71-befd-653c19e07a73Show Once: True
            • +
              464.Astarion: Oh don't be sorry, we both knew what we were to each other. A fun distraction, nothing more.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 888b754e-962a-6f75-86da-7e9bad4842d0Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h32ab70b2g0a38g47d7g9ffeg116df23408caText UUID: 29beea50-788d-4fa4-bccf-815e0637925cTimeline Phase Index: 314Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 888b754e-962a-6f75-86da-7e9bad4842d0Timeline Phase Duration: 14.77sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 888b754e-962a-6f75-86da-7e9bad4842d0Group Index: 0
              • •
                828.Astarion: Anyway, I still get to look at you and remember everything we did together. [End]

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f6305433-ebcc-c124-c6e7-aee571250f53Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hbc6797e4gcdf4g4d2bg8cf3g421fd347cc66Text UUID: 9e2a502c-0fb8-4d4d-bb98-5c077a99ff21End Node: TrueGroup ID: 888b754e-962a-6f75-86da-7e9bad4842d0Group Index: 1
          • +
            490.Player: You can care about more than one person. I'd like to keep seeing you, too.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 9334de5c-1e27-dc8b-3540-1e219fd45d4bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h6e9f3dffg6cf1g4b6ega2a8g022fbb0f7bdfText UUID: 25f1883b-4c5d-44bc-acea-d7b64803605cShow Once: True
            • +
              446.Astarion: Oh my dear, you're sweet, but we must have standards.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8330f54e-09f9-6ac7-8451-4019eec5a53cSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h6ec023b8g0183g4e6dga685g3fecb079cb9cText UUID: e3c3aa31-9ea8-4dfe-9c22-19cc07c77922Timeline Phase Index: 226Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8330f54e-09f9-6ac7-8451-4019eec5a53cTimeline Phase Duration: 9.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 8330f54e-09f9-6ac7-8451-4019eec5a53cGroup Index: 0
              • +
                120.Astarion: I am not interested in being in any love triangle that involves Gale.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1f9913e9-656d-1a28-3e91-a29132530c55Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hf545ef90g418bg407eg8085g864b87edb5ecText UUID: 10806dc8-d39d-4e73-b5db-80ab720e5693Group ID: 8330f54e-09f9-6ac7-8451-4019eec5a53cGroup Index: 1
                • +
                  719.Player: Thanks for taking this so maturely.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d2ab5a2c-1963-6953-145d-e994f3b770fcSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: haedbd4beg0402g400eg8121g05c1bc68f755Text UUID: 9114b8d2-dabd-44b8-a0fa-e0e5ab8dd263Show Once: True
                  • +
                    526.Astarion: If it helps, I'm more than happy with where things are.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9cf76726-de37-5338-6659-b714ae47630fSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h85a2eddeg8bb7g47b0ga21dg9c8affe8f860Text UUID: 018f3e65-f5e8-49b6-8c5a-86310ccb2f35Timeline Phase Index: 71Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9cf76726-de37-5338-6659-b714ae47630fTimeline Phase Duration: 3.56sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                    • •
                      250.Astarion: After all, I know you'll spend the rest of your days dreaming about the nights we spent together. You lucky thing, you. [End]!ORI_State_DatingAstarion

                      Flags and Tags

                      settype Object | speaker 1 Player
                      • ORI_State_DatingAstarion {ba298c56-26b6-4918-9bd4-616668d369d8} = False

                • +
                  178.Player: Well, that's that, then.

                  • See Node 526 (Astarion) If it helps, I'm more than happy with where things are.
                • +

          • +
            647.Player: Why have such a restrained view of love? Can't I keep seeing you as well?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: bb35a00c-b29f-bc61-81dd-39a953db8528Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h46dff993gd19cg44d7gbde6gf06e14bd9de6Text UUID: 6303b25d-884d-4c6b-9c54-64e91a33297cShow Once: True
            • +
              821.Astarion: Maybe if Shadowheart had more experience in these affairs, or if you two weren't just starting out, but this? No.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f24d7984-db7e-4eb6-62c7-a2c99c69e678Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h745f74efgd122g4d24g937cga1d878b978dbText UUID: 55a3e03a-3337-4a80-bf06-e9044c4c3d70Timeline Phase Index: 241Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f24d7984-db7e-4eb6-62c7-a2c99c69e678Timeline Phase Duration: 25.55sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: f24d7984-db7e-4eb6-62c7-a2c99c69e678Group Index: 0
              • +
                351.Astarion: Take it from someone with experience - hearts are built to break. They do it over the smallest things.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 67103dc0-35aa-e796-6a4e-45a2c1d103e3Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h14468afagf0c9g481ega9e8gf6cbf3b79950Text UUID: e0d685a3-7b99-4962-98f1-78e8346b5fe0Group ID: f24d7984-db7e-4eb6-62c7-a2c99c69e678Group Index: 1
                • +
                  352.Astarion: And if our favourite Sharran's heart breaks, I'm worried she might get a little... murdery?

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 67704202-eb07-653c-35f8-2232d23dfa01Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h99422b95g3bfdg49ecg82b9g4b2d1b91f25aText UUID: 88990312-e4ae-4120-aa36-cf97d2c5ae53Group ID: f24d7984-db7e-4eb6-62c7-a2c99c69e678Group Index: 2
                  • +
                    364.Player: I can see why you might want to stay out of that.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6a2f7c7e-9b7b-64a3-2fa4-19c1fe7d979fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h1cb11454g437cg4967g97eeg21ec998cec6bText UUID: 9f48e7ac-61f0-441b-837d-770c6f699e65Show Once: True

      237.Astarion: We had our fun, but it's far more fun to see Lae'zel trying to romance someone. Who knew githyanki love could be such priceless comedy?VISITEDREGION_BGO_Main_A

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global
      • VISITEDREGION_BGO_Main_A {40f06537-814f-4796-b012-5ffaa648a8d9} = True

      • +
        427.Astarion: But enough about your adorable personal life. What did you actually want to talk about?

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7c6785eb-5f32-9049-4959-fd30597c1083Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h131c3e19g8293g40cfgbe0eg9b11a19c913eText UUID: 02b98a65-3a99-4241-898e-9dac713f3575Group ID: 40430d32-60d5-e9e6-a0b5-8c125e973852Group Index: 1

          376.Jump to Node 19

          Metadata

          Node Type: JumpUUID: 6c9831f5-672e-3709-613b-32fd3c8b8f8fJump Target: Node 19 (05b247e0-98eb-4dbe-881e-7f4fa622af86)Jump Target Point: 2
    • +
      338.Astarion: Not that I wanted to hear it, but you and Lae'zel are louder than worgs in heat. Although the shouts and screams do sound more tender and loving lately.!VISITEDREGION_BGO_Main_A

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global
      • VISITEDREGION_BGO_Main_A {40f06537-814f-4796-b012-5ffaa648a8d9} = False

          • +
            203.Player: I can be with you both, if you're comfortable with that?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 36fd73de-b5a1-8f05-9b7f-6de10da7ac0dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h6ba8269eg6d21g4badgba3agbfba880ef740Text UUID: 8f1f8776-fb6b-48c4-acba-55d355bb2601Show Once: True
            • +
              814.Astarion: I am in no way comfortable with that! Lae'zel would never approve and I value my life too much to get on her bad side.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f05cc924-b937-4fa3-a542-95e461ce0fc9Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: he3fc5adfgf45fg42e1gbc25ga4d1b1d7c90bText UUID: f7786a62-bdd0-4480-81a2-d27979dfbe3bTimeline Phase Index: 115Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f05cc924-b937-4fa3-a542-95e461ce0fc9Timeline Phase Duration: 8.7sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

      596.Astarion: Wyll's the sort of prince-type I would have once dreamed of marrying. When I was about thirteen.!VISITEDREGION_BGO_Main_A

      Flags and Tags

          • +
            95.Player: Actually, if you're comfortable with it, perhaps I can keep being with both of you?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 16cdf1a5-dadc-40bb-dd5e-7343f0803ca0Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hfdfd6d23g0231g4321g9e5bgdc45393c437fText UUID: dda31e9d-1ae8-46d7-bce8-2bd6747c0c47Show Once: True
            • +
              453.Astarion: Come now, Wyll won't agree to that. He's stuck in the past, and that's coming from a vampire.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 85ae85dd-23f2-aee5-a075-14fcf6924b74Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h4ea8d892gc7d9g41b8g8574g49220ad57856Text UUID: bf91f4f1-13f6-4b00-be65-d7b06ef59b1dTimeline Phase Index: 294Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 85ae85dd-23f2-aee5-a075-14fcf6924b74Timeline Phase Duration: 16.3sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 85ae85dd-23f2-aee5-a075-14fcf6924b74Group Index: 0
              • +
                295.Astarion: But if you ever get tired of your decades-long devotion to one another, I'm always here for a sordid affair.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 54eee2d0-10ec-f2d6-e66e-6c4377f487c0Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hbac3e9c7g0b0cg4c9eg984eg61a109e90d70Text UUID: 64f26a94-ae30-43cd-9dbc-9ecbab725bcfGroup ID: 85ae85dd-23f2-aee5-a075-14fcf6924b74Group Index: 1
                • +
                  329.Player: Trust me, that's never going to happen.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5d00db30-9e18-3f0f-5a60-79d2c1bd4d93Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h7613ce58gd15ag4e7cgba39g0c04ddb3a8bbText UUID: 20952202-c9b5-435d-8ba4-a57e02cd3f81Show Once: True
                  • +
                    610.Astarion: Never say never, darling.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b216ec92-fe50-e93f-2cf2-90316df6ce9fSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h38ce7faegb3bfg4ae2g9e06g22b42b992fb1Text UUID: 8561dd7c-8f2b-4810-ba42-d0bb31013ae9Timeline Phase Index: 104Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b216ec92-fe50-e93f-2cf2-90316df6ce9fTimeline Phase Duration: 2.88sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                    • •
                      667.Astarion: But for now, I'm more than happy for you and your newly-acquired Blade. If only he was as sharp as me. [End]!ORI_State_DatingAstarion

                      Flags and Tags

                      settype Object | speaker 1 Player
                      • ORI_State_DatingAstarion {ba298c56-26b6-4918-9bd4-616668d369d8} = False

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c0353b05-0e2e-f18a-e33c-2be72e327216Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h61e6f2f7g469bg40e2g9e78g8471b5dc2fc7Text UUID: e818e16b-34c0-470c-81cc-68b39cd8a32aTimeline Phase Index: 311Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c0353b05-0e2e-f18a-e33c-2be72e327216Timeline Phase Duration: 7.95sTimeline Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
                • +
                  861.Player: I might bear that in mind.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: fff920ac-6dc8-0375-118c-ef3206deca99Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hfdf80d66g8d8bg401cga1a6g2ab5af61e937Text UUID: eb6bde09-13a8-4358-945a-1c587d1e5e50Show Once: True
                  • +
                    771.Astarion: You little scoundrel, you.

                    Metadata

                    • See Node 667 (Astarion) But for now, I'm more than happy for you and your newly-acquired Blade. If only he was as sharp as me.
                • +
                  277.Player: You know you're a terrible person, right?

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4fff3f0c-ad36-62bc-44bc-8ff078fe0516Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hbddb1c10g4b5bg4ae3g9967gae45518734aeText UUID: 0e12b204-afd3-401a-9654-51ee9084ee80Show Once: True
                  • +
                    709.Astarion: Only when it comes to morals. I'm very, very good where it counts.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cfa15457-de2e-305e-eb16-ac5a6de95334Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hac203654gdea6g4ecbgbf13ga97c8c6f1ebfText UUID: b1b69434-46ff-47ee-8b23-ad64c8c62726Timeline Phase Index: 159Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cfa15457-de2e-305e-eb16-ac5a6de95334Timeline Phase Duration: 6.01sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                    • See Node 667 (Astarion) But for now, I'm more than happy for you and your newly-acquired Blade. If only he was as sharp as me.
                • +
                  114.Player: If I can only be with one person, I want to be with you.

    • +
      826.Astarion: Karlach treats every embrace as if it might be her last. Or your last. What a way to go...!GLO_ForgingOfTheHeart_State_KarlachSecondUpgradeVISITEDREGION_BGO_Main_A

      811.Astarion: You and Karlach? Well that's certainly a... unique pairing.!VISITEDREGION_BGO_Main_A

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global
      • VISITEDREGION_BGO_Main_A {40f06537-814f-4796-b012-5ffaa648a8d9} = False

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ef4ea03c-71b9-7545-31e1-e62b0983576eSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: had907484ge613g4a14gb34cgfd08e6de28f1Text UUID: 9d46e513-dc24-4098-b48d-13d0ae35c120Timeline Phase Index: 200Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ef4ea03c-71b9-7545-31e1-e62b0983576eTimeline Phase Duration: 21.36sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: ef4ea03c-71b9-7545-31e1-e62b0983576eGroup Index: 0
      • +
        195.Astarion: Imagine forgetting how it feels to hold someone. All because of what some devil did to her.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 34fcc029-d3a0-bba1-3d3a-50b5e937ca7eSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h992125bcgbeacg4731g9951g9e3fcca03128Text UUID: 8a04a1ec-65e1-442b-969a-8f3995045f71Group ID: ef4ea03c-71b9-7545-31e1-e62b0983576eGroup Index: 1
        • +
          217.Astarion: But she has you now. I'm sure that's some comfort.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3a9336f8-a878-f068-90f8-16dd20a37170Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hb3ed84c8gb0deg434agb310g558d1b1a556dText UUID: 384a356f-5d58-4392-91b2-8127f789d0c0Group ID: ef4ea03c-71b9-7545-31e1-e62b0983576eGroup Index: 2
          • +

              Metadata

              Node Type: AliasUUID: 3e32d1dd-3b22-b808-8f4a-404692907bb2Speaker: -1 (No Speaker)
              • +
                807.Player: That's right - Karlach is very important to me.!ORI_State_DatingAstarion

                Flags and Tags

                settype Object | speaker 1 Player
                • ORI_State_DatingAstarion {ba298c56-26b6-4918-9bd4-616668d369d8} = False

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ee66fea9-f3a2-8db2-2014-7b12297b5ebeSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5a997e34g50eeg4176g8066gc37020457815Text UUID: ab2e7ad7-3fc6-4f89-b0c2-085f6078a2f2Show Once: True
                • +
                  359.Astarion: I'll try not to take it personally that you chose someone you can't even touch over me.!GLO_ForgingOfTheHeart_State_KarlachSecondUpgrade

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Global
                  • GLO_ForgingOfTheHeart_State_KarlachSecondUpgrade {f6dc0de4-1089-43c0-b392-306a9a44387c} = False

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6920533c-3578-b5e0-23c9-937108e87a41Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hb8c43dabg1d67g4c11ga2ecgc31c996d8526Text UUID: f8bd008f-9af7-460a-977f-be1110faf20fTimeline Phase Index: 246Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6920533c-3578-b5e0-23c9-937108e87a41Timeline Phase Duration: 5.18sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • •
                    760.Astarion: But I'm sure you'll find your way. And we'll always have the memories of what we did together. [End]

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e06b0fe6-1b93-636b-baa9-aa60e0309244Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hc2f97087g2a92g4716gb8d5g064006453c42Text UUID: aec3032b-20ae-4aaf-b990-0ea4fc41eed8Timeline Phase Index: 331Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e06b0fe6-1b93-636b-baa9-aa60e0309244Timeline Phase Duration: 6.92sTimeline Phase Shots: 1End Node: True
                • +
                  11.Astarion: I'm sure she's something else now that you can touch her. All those years of pent-up frustration - it has to go somewhere.GLO_ForgingOfTheHeart_State_KarlachSecondUpgrade

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Global
                  • GLO_ForgingOfTheHeart_State_KarlachSecondUpgrade {f6dc0de4-1089-43c0-b392-306a9a44387c} = True

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 02d7c618-6a3e-300b-d0b1-7e32d36b96fcSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: he2880d63gcbccg4d06g9532g1783b1524894Text UUID: 63732485-47af-40ca-8a07-43370b5316cbTimeline Phase Index: 302Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 02d7c618-6a3e-300b-d0b1-7e32d36b96fcTimeline Phase Duration: 7.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • See Node 760 (Astarion) But I'm sure you'll find your way. And we'll always have the memories of what we did together.
              • +
                832.Player: I'm sure Karlach wouldn't mind if we kept seeing each other.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f70d8c22-8249-c7db-9013-4b0ca7c11fefSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h720a8f54gc695g4b00gb74fgb4be95d37589Text UUID: b793a5d7-8623-4d52-9526-ab4c9213d892Show Once: True
                • +
                  232.Astarion: Darling, healthy relationships are not my strong point, but even I can see she loves you.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3e732f6f-eb44-2e4e-ad0e-7535764e90adSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h81bda460g6897g41c4gbf63gfaabd7ffbb1bText UUID: 7e9c5891-e58b-49e5-b28b-30e7af6d16b5Timeline Phase Index: 234Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3e732f6f-eb44-2e4e-ad0e-7535764e90adTimeline Phase Duration: 21.84sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 3e732f6f-eb44-2e4e-ad0e-7535764e90adGroup Index: 0
                  • +
                    93.Astarion: Normally I'd be all for finding an arrangement, but hearts are fragile things at the best of times. And Karlach's?

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 16699299-709b-5d8e-294d-d3877ac49c86Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: haf874a13g1438g4ab8ga0c8g34ac719fa760Text UUID: b9ec34cd-c71d-455a-b02d-eba3f3d84c3bGroup ID: 3e732f6f-eb44-2e4e-ad0e-7535764e90adGroup Index: 1
                    • +
                      394.Astarion: After what she's been through, it will need a very gentle hand. So let's not complicate things, hmm?

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 72ce574e-d157-2fbc-409c-60227151771cSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h00ddaf85g3229g4f78gb9efgcc49c5f5cd58Text UUID: d1b9741e-2fd2-47cc-b8f7-71952bcce762Group ID: 3e732f6f-eb44-2e4e-ad0e-7535764e90adGroup Index: 2
                      • +
                        423.Player: I can see why you'd want to stay out of something like this.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7b8a58cb-668e-5561-a370-8f25be6b0ac7Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h9225a26agd81cg4ef9g9a91ga116e6911318Text UUID: 3bc74af0-692d-4b19-b872-96f716a96ef7Show Once: True
                        • •

          244.Astarion: I just - I didn't think...

          Metadata

          • +
            273.Astarion: Well that's it, isn't it? I didn't think - because if I had for even half a second I would have realised how stupid this was.

            Metadata

            • •

            348.Astarion: Ha! All right, fair enough.

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 664939bb-ba6f-7a04-c743-4fa7419d65cbSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h5829a769gdba2g4d68gae17g6802bd191ca3Text UUID: 36bb9f2f-88d6-4fd6-90d9-3dc27ca14536Timeline Phase Index: 242Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 664939bb-ba6f-7a04-c743-4fa7419d65cbTimeline Phase Duration: 3.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
            • +
              86.Astarion: My point is you didn't have to choose this.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 15198836-e8bd-f757-30e4-111ed17bcb5fSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h408239f1g8b73g4786g8bf2g70ee829ed257Text UUID: 701d74b3-13bb-42b3-856a-524f75d75062Timeline Phase Index: 221Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 15198836-e8bd-f757-30e4-111ed17bcb5fTimeline Phase Duration: 5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
              • +
                822.Player: But I did. I want this. I want you.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f2f15753-0c6a-1b46-f5ca-af33a78865a8Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5761bdeag9b0fg4065g8bbeg401df9f58339Text UUID: 430b5ddb-d6a8-4e64-a0bf-c6da2e22cff4Show Once: True
                • •
                  695.Astarion: You know, darling, I think we are going to have a lot of fun together. [End]

              • +
                813.Player: I've made my decision, so you'd better get used to it.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f0385a71-fc51-bc22-4e55-dfbd2fd9b6e3Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: had05d51ag62f2g4513gbd8cg79585c4a785bText UUID: d20f71c6-fa65-4925-b45e-a38ac8b61882Show Once: True
                • +
                  767.Astarion: Well, if you insist on loving and adoring me, I guess I'll have to allow it.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e2cc4ecf-614b-cd36-1fa6-70cace0b70a7Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h568e134cg60a0g4c5agb6acg7ebddda41ba3Text UUID: a801e867-bd8a-4974-824b-1e3816337095Timeline Phase Index: 118Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e2cc4ecf-614b-cd36-1fa6-70cace0b70a7Timeline Phase Duration: 8sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e05ce96e-8847-421d-8c0e-32e2739503e5Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd1cf8bb6g996cg440fg9201gde6b62868910Text UUID: e8f1cfb1-0b2e-40df-b8f4-e205e341bde0Show Once: True
                • +
                  837.Astarion: Not exactly a resounding declaration of love, but... maybe that's for the best.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f95d5be1-8182-2d15-ed5c-eb44cca915d1Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hf121c4e7g8595g40b7gbc0dgc535ea4f8cf8Text UUID: 6d3ddf01-1f8f-4d89-a98b-ab52f5734ddfTimeline Phase Index: 320Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f95d5be1-8182-2d15-ed5c-eb44cca915d1Timeline Phase Duration: 9.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: f95d5be1-8182-2d15-ed5c-eb44cca915d1Group Index: 0
                  • •
                    270.Astarion: All right. Let's see what happens. [End]

            297.Astarion: Not everyone lusts for blood, darling. Or could be cursed to an eternity in the shadows if they lose their brain parasite.

            543.Astarion: We'd better rest, then. Tomorrow is going to be a busy, bloody day. [End]

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a1da86d8-d2d8-0176-c458-d2c0e3049d2dSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h10329ff6gc327g42f4g9ee1ge30ecbe6fb2bText UUID: aabf1e61-1e0e-4168-acbd-b564865bac0bEnd Node: TrueGroup ID: cf8b0026-c9ec-c639-9eb2-e4242575168aGroup Index: 1

    Yes, love?
    hb420562fg8423g4f39ga567gcea5c15b3054 | 0b285949-a8a7-49ef-ba9c-f761405ede1b | stub

    ha735a3d6g0cbcg4682g8571g7273b6b12dba | 3859682c-825d-445c-ac2d-26127adaaf10 | stub

    506.Astarion: My consort, we are so close to our triumph, I can almost taste it.ORI_Astarion_State_BecameVampireLordNIGHT_Astarion_BlackMassAftermathORI_State_PartneredWithAstarion

    Flags and Tags

    checktype Global
    • ORI_Astarion_State_BecameVampireLord {c446ce94-efd8-45d5-b407-284177b6b57e} = True
    • NIGHT_Astarion_BlackMassAftermath {347b8d34-c287-4d15-83c5-7ae6786003c7} = True
    checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
    • ORI_State_PartneredWithAstarion {30819c8d-b39d-42e7-acd1-2a8c2c309994} = True

    Text

    My consort, we are so close to our triumph, I can almost taste it.
    hc7b3f411g73ecg472fga3c5gb07f9fd325e1 | 8292d3e1-e6c1-4302-ac07-e69a36ed3201 | stub
    Look at you, precious thing. You always stare so eagerly.
    h21db8480g58a0g450cgab74g10e986fcae38 | d143108a-8fb9-45ca-a56b-8e3f2825a979 | stub
    Little love, whatever could be the matter?
    hcd4393a5gdb1fg4cf7ga85fg1fa2158d6fde | 7e0e9de3-36ae-4a71-96e1-e7dcc2737459 | stub
    Ask me anything, and it will be yours.

      • •
        781.Astarion: Oh, what's to tell? I'm a magistrate back in the city - it's all rather tedious.!ORI_Astarion_Knows_VampirenessAstarion_InParty_Event_ToldAboutMagistrate

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Global
        • ORI_Astarion_Knows_Vampireness {43c71ab0-1aca-484a-950d-54106ae46da5} = False
        settype Object | speaker 1 Player
        • Astarion_InParty_Event_ToldAboutMagistrate {aae63bc5-4522-58a4-b341-b2bd8f9f3485} = True

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e5478d0d-c38d-45dd-b3a2-25b2401d5e53Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h9167629bga61cg4012ga5c6ge584960f6924Text UUID: 4b363be8-6f5d-43b0-bd28-d6677a7c9db5Timeline Phase Index: 107Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e5478d0d-c38d-45dd-b3a2-25b2401d5e53Timeline Phase Duration: 6sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
      • +
        619.Astarion: What's to tell? I was sired by a vampire named Cazador.ORI_Astarion_Knows_Vampireness

        Flags and Tags

        checktype Global
        • ORI_Astarion_Knows_Vampireness {43c71ab0-1aca-484a-950d-54106ae46da5} = True

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b413c217-d6a3-42d2-a4f8-c585a5cd436bSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hce6f705eg2b4ag4a61g8628gb10825349584Text UUID: 5ee99e68-60fa-46fe-aab3-b9e6c820839eTimeline Phase Index: 168Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b413c217-d6a3-42d2-a4f8-c585a5cd436bTimeline Phase Duration: 16sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: b413c217-d6a3-42d2-a4f8-c585a5cd436bGroup Index: 0
        • +
          407.Astarion: Everything before that is so long ago it's ancient history. And everything that came after - well, I'd rather not reflect on it.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 767aa4df-21b2-48a4-b461-d092ee78afa5Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h25da5660g7e3cg4be6g8e0cg551bf67ef423Text UUID: 0a47eabf-a497-4da7-97cf-ac03e3adeb90Group ID: b413c217-d6a3-42d2-a4f8-c585a5cd436bGroup Index: 1
          • +
            353.Player: You must remember your life before that?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 67e4180a-eb88-4307-994a-f2d3b51c7b60Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h132c9a53gf311g4841gb816gfa1d04f15561Text UUID: c6232f7c-29a5-4d40-b57a-a63560320f0dShow Once: True
            • +
              224.Astarion: I was a magistrate, working to keep the peace in Baldur's Gate. Imprisoning trouble makers, that kind of thing.Astarion_InParty_Event_ToldAboutMagistrate

              Flags and Tags

              settype Object | speaker 1 Player
              • Astarion_InParty_Event_ToldAboutMagistrate {aae63bc5-4522-58a4-b341-b2bd8f9f3485} = True

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3d85adc3-5a91-452f-bea8-95a80cdef843Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h10163a31gc00bg4f65g8005g14de94f15606Text UUID: 525f2b47-8c4c-446d-9cb7-7a82d8929645Timeline Phase Index: 238Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3d85adc3-5a91-452f-bea8-95a80cdef843Timeline Phase Duration: 16.91sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 3d85adc3-5a91-452f-bea8-95a80cdef843Group Index: 0
              • •
                418.Astarion: I can't remember much, truth be told. Centuries of torment will do that to you.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 79feb373-cf26-4fce-b4c5-42266c0d65fdSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h4e27e485g00b4g4456g80d1g0d675484461dText UUID: 8400fadc-60cb-4eff-9921-cf1558d66bd8Group ID: 3d85adc3-5a91-452f-bea8-95a80cdef843Group Index: 1
          • +
            844.Player: How were you turned?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: fae0932d-cb43-47ed-b790-d28bb186ee60Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h39fa11a0g290fg45e3ga6d1g9e6d318325e7Text UUID: c36101a4-7d8c-4851-8e0f-6a46fc4fc727Show Once: True
            • +
              857.Astarion: I was attacked. A gang of vagrants, a tribe of wandering 'Gur', took issue with a ruling I'd made.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ff1f7b36-bbe5-40de-8af0-d55049abd1f6Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: he8665ed1g291fg439dg9427g7755c6f91d6aText UUID: dc031827-e6b0-4642-a9a7-3f1d660876a5Timeline Phase Index: 231Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ff1f7b36-bbe5-40de-8af0-d55049abd1f6Timeline Phase Duration: 32.7sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: ff1f7b36-bbe5-40de-8af0-d55049abd1f6Group Index: 0
              • +
                294.Astarion: They beat me to death's door when Cazador appeared. He chased them off and offered to save me. To give me eternal life.b44c2db4-10e2-4297-a054-8bfbc806bd7d

                Flags and Tags

                settype Quest | speaker 1 Player
                • b44c2db4-10e2-4297-a054-8bfbc806bd7d = True

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 54bd3e08-4969-4c28-a387-4b9c903c251cSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h4e91b6a3g7e9dg4edeg8dd4ga51b87db73e6Text UUID: 2b6d0184-cc50-410f-85a1-3543718e00e8Group ID: ff1f7b36-bbe5-40de-8af0-d55049abd1f6Group Index: 1
                • +
                  227.Astarion: Given that my choices were 'eternal life' or 'bleed to death on the street', I took him up on the offer.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3e2fe753-7486-4624-84c5-89baf2be0d00Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h82aab06age543g4ad1g8a10gb13cb1ade7c1Text UUID: bdf2a37d-5a01-42fe-8f17-5f870d5ca16bGroup ID: ff1f7b36-bbe5-40de-8af0-d55049abd1f6Group Index: 2
                  • •
                    116.Astarion: It was only afterwards I realised just how long 'eternity' could be.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1dfb2c1d-7845-422d-a3d1-970c99ac7b65Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h126ab44ag8615g4ff4g95aeg8bff2c9b7183Text UUID: bcdcc143-a628-4e71-a57e-4e32d8d951ffGroup ID: ff1f7b36-bbe5-40de-8af0-d55049abd1f6Group Index: 3
          • •

            Metadata

      675.Player: Tell me about your history.!ORI_Astarion_State_CazadorPermaDefeatedORI_Astarion_Knows_Vampireness!Astarion_InParty_AskedPast2Astarion_InParty_AskedPastAstarion_InParty_AskedPast2

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c3d422e4-2b2e-4dd5-bb00-c2e96de33a10Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd9d3e83fgb4ecg47dbgbb6fge30d81ed3cf7Text UUID: a9286893-7d30-402e-a2c9-8423dddfd228Show Once: True
      • +
        500.Astarion: Why do you insist on exhuming the past?

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 964d4c4e-3256-478c-9be6-af1020c392e2Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h0acc4e70g1a50g4e43g99c8ge1a139b0bad4Text UUID: da6454e7-5c51-4687-bc82-d9933652975bTimeline Phase Index: 233Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 964d4c4e-3256-478c-9be6-af1020c392e2Timeline Phase Duration: 30sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: 964d4c4e-3256-478c-9be6-af1020c392e2Group Index: 0
        • +
          104.Astarion: I was a slave, a vampire spawn, kept by the Szarr family.8b87c643-481b-40db-9c04-327e54f6f5cb

          Flags and Tags

          settype Quest | speaker 1 Player
          • 8b87c643-481b-40db-9c04-327e54f6f5cb = True

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 19aef3ac-c80e-4039-b3e7-751036b57f72Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h23ee20d0g43cbg4007g90bdg8a793fea21bdText UUID: 4796f8bc-dc8e-499f-8bed-92c4a76d4a11Group ID: 964d4c4e-3256-478c-9be6-af1020c392e2Group Index: 1
          • +
            728.Astarion: Perhaps I still am. I was never able to resist their commands.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d5c33445-c715-4162-8128-600bb9a3c2e5Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h69bb913eg1031g4dbeg86b7g02a361b010fcText UUID: 59a82eff-ac3f-4e21-9024-51540d48d7e1Group ID: 964d4c4e-3256-478c-9be6-af1020c392e2Group Index: 2
            • •
              492.Astarion: But now I've been conveniently lost. They won't ever control me again.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 93bba320-b179-4ed9-940d-23a825d2c3cdSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hbefe11a9g57c9g458cg86cag9a36f760d500Text UUID: 45040b03-8b27-45f2-8bb8-fedfa7c8e170Group ID: 964d4c4e-3256-478c-9be6-af1020c392e2Group Index: 3
    • +
      215.Player: How does someone become a vampire, exactly?!ORI_Astarion_State_CazadorPermaDefeatedORI_Astarion_Knows_Vampireness!Astarion_InParty_Asked_HowCreateVampireAstarion_InParty_Asked_HowCreateVampire

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global
      • ORI_Astarion_State_CazadorPermaDefeated {5258c8d8-09a3-4343-bb6e-13ff5b8e3438} = False
      • ORI_Astarion_Knows_Vampireness {43c71ab0-1aca-484a-950d-54106ae46da5} = True
      checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
      • Astarion_InParty_Asked_HowCreateVampire {e9e6f30f-a52a-cb8f-8f59-24a965a2128f} = False
      settype Object | speaker 1 Player
      • Astarion_InParty_Asked_HowCreateVampire {e9e6f30f-a52a-cb8f-8f59-24a965a2128f} = True

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 39d59bca-709b-493a-960f-2f6c695273a3Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h952217bbgf101g4ff2gbea7g0fc383482244Text UUID: 86d8bbb7-3e87-46b0-89d0-7126654cbf6fShow Once: True
      • +
        33.Astarion: It's simple. Just find a vampire that will drink your blood and turn you into a vampire spawn: their obedient puppet.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 09393cf1-c1f2-4193-a99e-13caf54920f2Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h6e853974gb5c3g42b9g9514gc4713163422fText UUID: 496f317f-9562-4246-867c-f37f443a6a45Timeline Phase Index: 176Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 09393cf1-c1f2-4193-a99e-13caf54920f2Timeline Phase Duration: 19sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 09393cf1-c1f2-4193-a99e-13caf54920f2Group Index: 0
        • +
          797.Astarion: In theory, the next step is to drink their blood. Once you've done that, you're free and a true vampire.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: eb1b5d92-cdd0-47c4-892c-297abb4aa250Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h614beef8gf62bg413fga1e5g106da9aec6ccText UUID: cc6f1bff-5c9e-4174-ae4a-c649dbae1eafGroup ID: 09393cf1-c1f2-4193-a99e-13caf54920f2Group Index: 1
          • +
            63.Player: 'In theory'?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 10144194-1da1-49b9-aca0-895237052021Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h29f279e5ge66fg414bga47fgcadb660cd958Text UUID: f55918b2-17ca-4b64-89d1-d01ff229bd5fShow Once: True
            • +
              285.Astarion: People think the biggest threat to a vampire is a cleric with a stake. It's not.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 52eaef52-a7b4-44ac-8fd5-1d7e24bbc18dSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h224bad60gbc36g4086g8eb0g1e46461304f7Text UUID: c0c34b54-ea23-4da4-8897-a8995b7e7620Timeline Phase Index: 301Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 52eaef52-a7b4-44ac-8fd5-1d7e24bbc18dTimeline Phase Duration: 22.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 52eaef52-a7b4-44ac-8fd5-1d7e24bbc18dGroup Index: 0
              • +
                839.Astarion: The biggest threat to a vampire is another vampire. They're scheming, paranoid, power-hungry beasts.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fa269d24-9918-414c-8d06-df0cf4ad5e6cSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h7702af00ge304g43c7g8ae9g0aea40703681Text UUID: a0f2c4d5-fd55-457d-aa4c-fdc1a7db1f9dGroup ID: 52eaef52-a7b4-44ac-8fd5-1d7e24bbc18dGroup Index: 1
                • +
                  413.Astarion: So why would any vampire give up control over a spawn to create a competitor?

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 789388bf-b5cf-4030-855e-db3f153a775eSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h0fd689b4g4603g4d8dg81cfgf4dec7570840Text UUID: 7199322f-760f-400b-a3d9-93a0c6f6b2feGroup ID: 52eaef52-a7b4-44ac-8fd5-1d7e24bbc18dGroup Index: 2
                  • +
                    117.Astarion: Trust me. It doesn't happen.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1e5ec2f6-8d21-4048-ae48-658efa865274Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hc28d422eg13a6g49c4g8554gc67423b99062Text UUID: 368a2920-6226-4706-b195-3afbcae2a5bfTimeline Phase Index: 230Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1e5ec2f6-8d21-4048-ae48-658efa865274Timeline Phase Duration: 5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                    • •
                      519.Jump to Node 19

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: JumpUUID: 9a5a0dd1-b31b-4b46-b7e8-4d30e1bf4914Jump Target: Node 19 (05b247e0-98eb-4dbe-881e-7f4fa622af86)Jump Target Point: 2
          • +
            66.Player: So they bite you, you bite them?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 11083e17-738c-4abb-b364-24589921b368Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h6cc4db6cg324cg4e5dg94f9gb33296dfee9aText UUID: 9eba02b7-3627-4154-ae18-7a701c24ee53Show Once: True
            • +
              631.Astarion: Yes and no. The problem is once you're a vampire spawn, they completely control you. They have to allow you to bite them.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b68cf1f4-fe1c-480f-a887-983abc508166Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h30bf24cag45b5g4006g93c6g7bc4addfd79dText UUID: af10844a-b472-4090-af60-551649f0bd8fTimeline Phase Index: 199Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b68cf1f4-fe1c-480f-a887-983abc508166Timeline Phase Duration: 25.6sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: b68cf1f4-fe1c-480f-a887-983abc508166Group Index: 0
              • +
                179.Astarion: And why would they do that? Vampires are power-hungry creatures. They won't lose a servant to create a competitor.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2e1c6d03-ba7a-4a71-be40-734b451d433cSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h212cc95eg0260g48deg9045g8c4ee66fe3e4Text UUID: f4253a9c-b684-4202-b21d-53acfeb2a979Group ID: b68cf1f4-fe1c-480f-a887-983abc508166Group Index: 1
                • See Node 117 (Astarion) Trust me. It doesn't happen.
          • +
            444.Player: You'd have to drink Cazador's blood to be free?ORI_Astarion_Knows_CazadorMaster

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Global
            • ORI_Astarion_Knows_CazadorMaster {7236c69b-fe20-afdb-a6fa-15c1fb9fb6ae} = True

            • +
              525.Astarion: Free and a true vampire, capable of creating my own coven? Yes.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9c884afc-8e54-4bc5-8b44-602276501fbdSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h8485e1f2gaabcg4b46gbda9gcfd71a05d653Text UUID: 0f468743-e115-4667-bc38-c358bee1f4e2Timeline Phase Index: 75Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9c884afc-8e54-4bc5-8b44-602276501fbdTimeline Phase Duration: 16.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 9c884afc-8e54-4bc5-8b44-602276501fbdGroup Index: 0
              • +
                536.Astarion: Although I'd settle for just killing the bastard. I wouldn't be a 'true' vampire, but I'd be free of him.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9f8a435a-f435-4c2e-afda-aef922a77662Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hc74cd92ag336cg4e90g8bc6g2fa389ba27f2Text UUID: 197fc216-3d12-44af-92ef-d4b2b4cc0e47Group ID: 9c884afc-8e54-4bc5-8b44-602276501fbdGroup Index: 1
                • See Node 519 Jump to Node 19

      • +
        621.Astarion: We can't. And yet I crossed the threshold like moonlight through leaves.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b4c01788-a157-4757-9821-d8844d3680f7Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h31ea5908gd781g4678g94c3ge02154fba7dfText UUID: 645c00ef-051b-4bf9-bff9-5fd11b76c157Timeline Phase Index: 237Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b4c01788-a157-4757-9821-d8844d3680f7Timeline Phase Duration: 14sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: b4c01788-a157-4757-9821-d8844d3680f7Group Index: 0
        • +
          49.Astarion: This worm is a powerful little beast, isn't it?

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0d7071f2-7e17-4825-bb8c-1af6e10eb4e0Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: ha25329a0gd0e7g462agbaa6gbdf3e7190033Text UUID: 56d18c06-2839-4410-9d7b-03f5ed97b05bGroup ID: b4c01788-a157-4757-9821-d8844d3680f7Group Index: 1
          • +
            365.Player: Yes, that's what worries me.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6a5c06cd-dcc6-4893-976b-84795228882cSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h1ed4001ag31c2g4465g9184ge155f13318dbText UUID: 18bf381e-f6a6-4927-98e0-9d43c34872d6Show Once: True
            • +
              180.Astarion: Oh don't be so glum. Look at the power it's bringing us.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2e51dbef-3279-44d3-9616-e8ec38f98afbSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h85062139gbe50g4818ga960g7bd09fb55e6fText UUID: 6c41823b-96f0-41af-96b2-457be1f60d95Timeline Phase Index: 198Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2e51dbef-3279-44d3-9616-e8ec38f98afbTimeline Phase Duration: 15.87sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 2e51dbef-3279-44d3-9616-e8ec38f98afbGroup Index: 0
              • +
                683.Astarion: I can walk in sunlight, trespass upon any home, manipulate minds - there isn't another vampire in the Realms like me!f10bd9a4-395d-42de-9cb2-7066382e2bad

                Flags and Tags

                settype Quest | speaker 1 Player
                • f10bd9a4-395d-42de-9cb2-7066382e2bad = True

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c628d1ef-c8c9-4a4b-8476-82971bab7651Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h2f2c3084ge56ag4cbdgad8fgcc9ef8fa380cText UUID: 8955482b-480f-4180-8ac8-42887634feb3Group ID: 2e51dbef-3279-44d3-9616-e8ec38f98afbGroup Index: 1
                • +
                  541.Astarion: Granted, the looming doom is an issue, but why not enjoy the benefits while we can?

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a0d016ac-d91b-47dd-a52a-e7a741ebd978Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hc1173b4ag548eg4647gb473ga2dd79c36a61Text UUID: 2716baeb-7186-4cc6-8de4-768eeac54612Timeline Phase Index: 60Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a0d016ac-d91b-47dd-a52a-e7a741ebd978Timeline Phase Duration: 8sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

              510.Astarion: What's not to enjoy? I can walk in sunlight, trespass upon any home, manipulate minds - I'm the most powerful vampire in the Realms!f10bd9a4-395d-42de-9cb2-7066382e2bad

      • +
        84.Astarion: Ah, ha ha ha, I was wondering when you were going to ask me about this.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 148f9e4b-9acd-7e97-d42d-c4314c46b98eSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hc31f535bg64bbg46c9g9097gf8d2f5303f09Text UUID: ee519e7b-c95f-49d4-9c1e-39a7ab24ae60Timeline Phase Index: 228Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 148f9e4b-9acd-7e97-d42d-c4314c46b98eTimeline Phase Duration: 6sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • +
          57.Player: How could you tell?

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 0eb6ad38-29eb-69d6-6201-43da6db1c758Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5976d550g1950g462fg9e2ag4946666d6886Text UUID: e51f18ff-2652-407c-877c-cd2183847857Show Once: True
          • +
            854.Astarion: I guessed. The man can't stay quiet about 'enjoying the freedom of Nature's gifts'. I bet he'd outlaw clothing if he could.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fdc23108-31db-2e12-eba4-d0d3d3549a8dSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h12be14c5g17cbg439bg8789gc1286c70fe02Text UUID: eac9bf8f-3c67-4977-b6c4-466cba44f877Timeline Phase Index: 125Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fdc23108-31db-2e12-eba4-d0d3d3549a8dTimeline Phase Duration: 10.49sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
            • +
              290.Player: So, you wouldn't mind? If I had something with him?

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5437d56a-bce9-5931-16cf-760b7d7d9043Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hf6fb4b15g01e5g456ag988ag9ef68396b5d1Text UUID: a6366d8d-3086-4987-bf3b-0bdcd2285ce4Show Once: True
              • +
                670.Astarion: I'm happy for you to have as much Halsin as you wish - but I do have one question.!NIGHT_Astarion_BlackMassAftermath

                Flags and Tags

                checktype Global
                • NIGHT_Astarion_BlackMassAftermath {347b8d34-c287-4d15-83c5-7ae6786003c7} = False

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c1a5c70a-b526-ee6e-7f3a-79a08d3f9d6aSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h852f8201g2829g4677gabbbg5db96c235ba2Text UUID: 6f0ceab4-8148-4e7b-8d6d-fceff2144668Timeline Phase Index: 286Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c1a5c70a-b526-ee6e-7f3a-79a08d3f9d6aTimeline Phase Duration: 13.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: c1a5c70a-b526-ee6e-7f3a-79a08d3f9d6aGroup Index: 0
                • +
                  236.Astarion: It's not because... you know... we haven't... in a while?

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 40059966-171c-842a-ce28-d1dbad9cfde6Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h1d7076aage17cg4c5agae4dg8ccc7142d699Text UUID: f46c8cff-b715-4a41-ac29-837b660a2f93Group ID: c1a5c70a-b526-ee6e-7f3a-79a08d3f9d6aGroup Index: 1
                  • +
                    668.Player: Gods, I don't want you to think that for a moment.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c0ac8c1f-0769-0d2a-9f84-fa022e304c0aSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc2f8d516gf2d4g4f5cgbbdbg5927b8e9b62eText UUID: 7b49e439-0e6e-4bf5-8b8f-f7b324ff2682Show Once: True
                    • +
                      843.Astarion: I know I was being foolish. But thank you for saying it.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: facfa8e3-5aab-225b-4de4-31707e3f7b67Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hcaa6f257g02b3g4175ga994g2e4ae38d8105Text UUID: 5d9aa70b-dffa-42d9-ab76-ed26b22263e4Timeline Phase Index: 123Timeline Dialog Node UUID: facfa8e3-5aab-225b-4de4-31707e3f7b67Timeline Phase Duration: 5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                      • •
                        640.Astarion: Go right on with Halsin. Far be it from me to hold your hunger against you. [End]CAMP_Halsin_CRD_Romance_PartnerAllowsHalsin

                        Flags and Tags

                        settype Object | speaker 1 Player

                  • +
                    253.Player: I've admired Halsin for a while, that's all it is.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 488a3734-7603-d69f-1825-e53a6e8bab8dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h829d1297ge349g40e3gb9b3g1960c0ebb895Text UUID: fe33ae2e-a82f-41c2-a8b5-de53044dbf51Show Once: True
                    • +
                      45.Astarion: I'm fairly sure the only one in the camp who hasn't is Withers, but even with him one can never be certain.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0c7d2731-2cf6-117e-84c3-6fec46c6c833Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h16213301g3f51g4c3egb8f4g2895c849b34aText UUID: fcdb06e3-6896-44de-857a-baf9a3b47ec9Timeline Phase Index: 209Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0c7d2731-2cf6-117e-84c3-6fec46c6c833Timeline Phase Duration: 9.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 0c7d2731-2cf6-117e-84c3-6fec46c6c833Group Index: 0
                      • +
                        467.Astarion: Even jerky was meat once.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 895cf2fa-8b75-1dbd-097e-f628b096b839Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hbf272dc1g7d3bg4c24ga8eeg45554200a9ccText UUID: 460b2a36-5054-41b0-b1f7-25f03f08b74bGroup ID: 0c7d2731-2cf6-117e-84c3-6fec46c6c833Group Index: 1
                        • See Node 640 (Astarion) Go right on with Halsin. Far be it from me to hold your hunger against you.
                  • +
                    146.Player: He propositioned me out of nowhere - I just want to see where it goes.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 26edc149-018c-083b-7314-783730913324Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h88359c33gbb85g4b37g97dbg78630c5f5f59Text UUID: 1a686641-4dce-49f1-9845-f04cdf9d3c92Show Once: True
                    • +
                      593.Astarion: What hovel were you living in, that you didn't see this coming back in the grove? Honestly. But that's fine.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: acbe7603-ef3f-f334-2759-e0e8cfd5fd13Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h8f66ff71gf4b1g4beegb824g072dc6561a07Text UUID: a76c7848-9c07-462c-a6bd-30e2631f0400Timeline Phase Index: 61Timeline Dialog Node UUID: acbe7603-ef3f-f334-2759-e0e8cfd5fd13Timeline Phase Duration: 7.27sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                      • See Node 640 (Astarion) Go right on with Halsin. Far be it from me to hold your hunger against you.
                  • +
                    406.Player: What I have with you is wholly different and very special to me.

                    Metadata

          Metadata

          • +

              Variant 1

              combine=0
              • Dragonborn
              He was a hulking dragonborn. Red scales, fire breath - very impressive.
              heeb5b680g4463g4f34g8d89ge1fe7b780c23 | 535e73af-46c1-4331-8f37-bcc672c47a42 | stub

                55.Astarion: That's interesting, but not the kind of person I'd expect to be hunting me.

          158.Astarion: I'll come to you tonight, when you're snugly wrapped in your bedroll and we can have a little privacy.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 298f8ab3-0ebe-320d-ea36-bf9fa3a81bb6Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h4c63f910g661fg448ag8037gb188cbdd087aText UUID: 076fc647-8b17-4763-8284-57356f521696Group ID: 6ed4bbd5-288a-8898-a8ee-a79e49fda5c0Group Index: 1
          • +
            303.Astarion: And this time I'll make sure I'm quiet - we don't want to disturb your rest.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 574494d8-8588-d482-36a1-67b61887c056Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h0f673fb7gf1c9g4f6dg9de4g656e89a37828Text UUID: 0cbe6233-7c12-4b8b-970d-982d8fb15c8fGroup ID: 6ed4bbd5-288a-8898-a8ee-a79e49fda5c0Group Index: 2
            • +

        808.Astarion: Darling, I thought you'd never ask. I'll see you tonight.ORI_Astarion_State_FeedingTonightORI_Astarion_State_FeedingTarget

        Flags and Tags

        settype Global
        • ORI_Astarion_State_FeedingTonight {cda3fa90-4fae-4334-b5e0-dc833d473842} = True
        settype Object | speaker 1 Player
        • ORI_Astarion_State_FeedingTarget {469b943c-d986-470f-bd2e-84077b458fdc} = True

        Text

        Darling, I thought you'd never ask. I'll see you tonight.
        hfbe67411g6126g4bd1g81c3gf7fbfce93fd7 | d3f04cb3-1d53-4977-a22f-a83eab0d414a | stub
        Then I'll see your delicious self tonight.
        h973d6a94g5229g4f4dgb2e6g114e87eca00c | 7d3689ed-ca84-4aad-9ee8-aade6e341d61 | stub
        I was so hoping you'd say that. Until later, then.
        h2611c05cg01e2g43d2gadb9gf760e630ceab | 16c0a47c-4513-4d0f-8650-6ff72a9b9be0 | stub
        Then I'll see you tonight, you sweet, generous thing.
        h1a6cbe10g520bg494bgb0b8g389e6e7fc86c | 1444fc87-935d-4d52-9ca4-f81bb4e63ed8 | stub
        I was just wondering when you'd invite me back for a bite.
        h4f09c3f2g1b6dg4e64gb57ag94f4f1da1847 | bd4b69a3-6aa3-480a-b5bd-01c1dd4b640d | stub

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: eef00c02-e68e-b0d9-854d-a415a5d57c3eSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text 1 Handle: hfbe67411g6126g4bd1g81c3gf7fbfce93fd7Text 1 UUID: d3f04cb3-1d53-4977-a22f-a83eab0d414aText 2 Handle: h973d6a94g5229g4f4dgb2e6g114e87eca00cText 2 UUID: 7d3689ed-ca84-4aad-9ee8-aade6e341d61Text 3 Handle: h2611c05cg01e2g43d2gadb9gf760e630ceabText 3 UUID: 16c0a47c-4513-4d0f-8650-6ff72a9b9be0Text 4 Handle: h1a6cbe10g520bg494bgb0b8g389e6e7fc86cText 4 UUID: 1444fc87-935d-4d52-9ca4-f81bb4e63ed8Text 5 Handle: h4f09c3f2g1b6dg4e64gb57ag94f4f1da1847Text 5 UUID: bd4b69a3-6aa3-480a-b5bd-01c1dd4b640dTimeline 1 Phase Index: 113Timeline 1 Dialog Node UUID: eef00c02-e68e-b0d9-854d-a415a5d57c3eTimeline 1 Phase Duration: 7.5sTimeline 1 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 2 Phase Index: 130Timeline 2 Dialog Node UUID: eef00c02-e68e-b0d9-854d-a415a5d57c3eTimeline 2 Phase Duration: 7.5sTimeline 2 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 3 Phase Index: 131Timeline 3 Dialog Node UUID: eef00c02-e68e-b0d9-854d-a415a5d57c3eTimeline 3 Phase Duration: 5.5sTimeline 3 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 4 Phase Index: 132Timeline 4 Dialog Node UUID: eef00c02-e68e-b0d9-854d-a415a5d57c3eTimeline 4 Phase Duration: 7.5sTimeline 4 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 5 Phase Index: 151Timeline 5 Dialog Node UUID: eef00c02-e68e-b0d9-854d-a415a5d57c3eTimeline 5 Phase Duration: 6.51sTimeline 5 Phase Shots: 2Timeline 6 Phase Index: 167Timeline 6 Dialog Node UUID: eef00c02-e68e-b0d9-854d-a415a5d57c3eTimeline 6 Phase Duration: 5.5sTimeline 6 Phase Shots: 2

                110.Player: Why? What's so special about the Gur people?

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 1b5c7339-6f47-459e-b039-22f635d7b608Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h2c2c99f9g1272g4219gad90gd2cb5cb61814Text UUID: 57698588-2fa4-4ed0-8410-b8840f4dfa6cShow Once: True
                • +
                  796.Astarion: It's - nothing.!ORI_Astarion_Knows_Vampireness

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Global
                  • ORI_Astarion_Knows_Vampireness {43c71ab0-1aca-484a-950d-54106ae46da5} = False

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ea369560-963e-4066-bf28-81f9f5881f6cSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hf327776dg4b54g46d2g810ag99ca814a5302Text UUID: b8ec2c13-7533-4e7e-a096-a93e238ea8a4Timeline Phase Index: 258Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ea369560-963e-4066-bf28-81f9f5881f6cTimeline Phase Duration: 9.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: ea369560-963e-4066-bf28-81f9f5881f6cGroup Index: 0
                  • +
                    404.Astarion: They're not special, they're just easy to buy and morally vacuous. Perfect lackeys.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7617759f-0488-4461-a208-64c1dc7bfbd8Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h85408409g110fg43bfg92c3g080b7ca9dbdaText UUID: 18d73de0-869e-4252-b2bd-9bdb29e20d84Group ID: ea369560-963e-4066-bf28-81f9f5881f6cGroup Index: 1
                    • •
                      342.Jump to Node 115

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: JumpUUID: 61498767-c9a8-44c3-89de-7c049fff81f4Jump Target: Node 115 (1d940742-cf75-4a13-aea4-6e2ba1cbbe9a)Jump Target Point: 1
                • +
                  833.Astarion: First, they make excellent monster hunters. So 'find a vampire spawn' sounds perfectly reasonable to them.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f756f945-dc28-4391-b780-9e4445bf7b1aSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hc4300f69gca63g4154g99c5g7fc399e6b70fText UUID: 47c7434b-8df6-4d6e-8b04-350e1673d681Timeline Phase Index: 133Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f756f945-dc28-4391-b780-9e4445bf7b1aTimeline Phase Duration: 8.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                  • +
                    119.Astarion: Second, they're the reason I'm like this in the first place. It was a group of Gur that attacked me that night in Baldur's Gate.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1ef55e66-70ff-4627-b1bf-23297673ee36Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h35ef9ae9g4153g4c76g8ba1g34fc9ed2fbdcText UUID: 7e97cbc0-f732-4c51-8d09-4c995d0c87d6Timeline Phase Index: 227Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1ef55e66-70ff-4627-b1bf-23297673ee36Timeline Phase Duration: 15sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 1ef55e66-70ff-4627-b1bf-23297673ee36Group Index: 0
                    • +
                      620.Astarion: I would've died had Cazador not appeared and saved me.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b4956b1d-7154-416f-9fea-a41e938ce4c9Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hf5ccd3f4gf3a2g44a3gb8cdg7373b281effbText UUID: 18254f36-fff7-471e-b163-517fae6765c4Group ID: 1ef55e66-70ff-4627-b1bf-23297673ee36Group Index: 1
                      • +
                        175.Player: Saved you by turning you into a vampire slave?ORI_Astarion_Knows_Vampireness

                        Flags and Tags

                        checktype Global
                        • ORI_Astarion_Knows_Vampireness {43c71ab0-1aca-484a-950d-54106ae46da5} = True

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2d7fac65-b94a-4586-9589-f672c5e97068Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5c9a3510gd6cbg4e09g9d1ag44bdcfdfc727Text UUID: bb4fc461-50df-49e6-8ad3-78e0793dfd70Show Once: True
                        • +
                          75.Astarion: Well, he didn't mention the 'slave' clause at the time.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 126f2608-b52f-4c1a-a6a3-b054ed942eb0Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h1ad72e13g0a7fg4923g9557gf11551beff08Text UUID: 888d02ae-d447-47c0-b0a8-a7f020ee572cTimeline Phase Index: 206Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 126f2608-b52f-4c1a-a6a3-b054ed942eb0Timeline Phase Duration: 12sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 126f2608-b52f-4c1a-a6a3-b054ed942eb0Group Index: 0
                          • +
                            127.Astarion: And now he sends a Gur monster hunter for me? It's a message.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 22995433-a32d-47b0-ae24-e9d7eddb7605Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h5436f12cg8986g4fa2gaed9g79dc297e805aText UUID: 9e55205e-5fc9-445c-9952-95d50338b0adGroup ID: 126f2608-b52f-4c1a-a6a3-b054ed942eb0Group Index: 1
                            • +
                              56.Astarion: He's reminding me of his power. Even in the middle of nowhere, he can reach me. And he wants me back.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0e51c1c8-6971-4fb0-9a25-ec5693717dddSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h81662232gbba5g459dgb6f4gec51e221aa82Text UUID: 89fd8f63-bd37-4512-a715-39ba27d74665Timeline Phase Index: 215Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0e51c1c8-6971-4fb0-9a25-ec5693717dddTimeline Phase Duration: 9.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                              • •
                                829.Jump to Node 577

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: JumpUUID: f63ab362-5134-48d0-9901-900f24c563a4Jump Target: Node 577 (a95193d9-1304-446c-839c-4cbda41bbcb1)Jump Target Point: 2
                      • +
                        377.Player: You can't hold every Gur responsible for what happened to you.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6cc32791-57c9-428e-87ef-bbbcb9faacaeSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h14526ff0g2b68g4729g8cccgeecf9b2f2074Text UUID: b170ab1a-f7b6-4eef-974d-1f598179cc71Show Once: True
                        • •
                          34.Astarion: I think you'll find I can. And there's nothing your bleeding heart can do to change my mind.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 094d0499-ec11-4fc9-a1b6-7f668253dc59Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h5140f1a9gd65cg4583gb7cdg339c9c8f233dText UUID: a77efcef-57b9-4b70-a291-5b6a0087789fTimeline Phase Index: 192Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 094d0499-ec11-4fc9-a1b6-7f668253dc59Timeline Phase Duration: 8sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                      • +
                        204.Player: So why send one after you now? To remind you of that night?

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 3726248f-8f5c-4baa-814d-fae099ed3506Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb201c607ga777g4abcgbb1ag7fa9e8284b17Text UUID: ad654e4c-b09b-48bb-abdf-42a1bea2dadcShow Once: True
                        • +
                          241.Astarion: Perhaps. He probably thought it was funny.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 41a6a6ae-aedd-4db4-a4bf-97d8a3d91ad9Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h7a6409eag0325g4191gae3fg45fc20f8a183Text UUID: b037f443-2c59-4f96-9e48-7f72e5d3bd32Timeline Phase Index: 284Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 41a6a6ae-aedd-4db4-a4bf-97d8a3d91ad9Timeline Phase Duration: 8sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 41a6a6ae-aedd-4db4-a4bf-97d8a3d91ad9Group Index: 0
                          • +
                            263.Astarion: But more likely, he's trying to send me a message.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4c0e5972-8e50-404f-bdfe-4b4fe763fed8Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h22d9e8ecgca3ag4ce8g92b1g7d415a7e74d0Text UUID: 637802e1-9a06-4b1c-801c-c8d17e73a1b1Group ID: 41a6a6ae-aedd-4db4-a4bf-97d8a3d91ad9Group Index: 1
                            • •
                              650.Jump to Node 56

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: JumpUUID: bb7095df-ac28-4f10-996f-d3a5ec6c6e57Jump Target: Node 56 (0e51c1c8-6971-4fb0-9a25-ec5693717ddd)Jump Target Point: 1
                      • +
                        50.Player: He appeared just when you needed him? Sounds convenient.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 0d804668-fef2-4d49-9eb7-f4edb7ed25adSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h10f18c27g0a73g43f0g800cg00c743eba5e4Text UUID: bf80c77d-6b1b-46d1-bffc-61d4386f9adcShow Once: True
                        • +
                          755.Astarion: Maybe. Maybe he was just drawn to the smell of blood.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: de54221e-f1fe-4490-9c94-ad578f54413dSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hcdf08460gbbdbg4824gaf8bgd3fbb5c95be6Text UUID: ba7a832a-386f-4f1c-8167-0f3a5edf670cTimeline Phase Index: 256Timeline Dialog Node UUID: de54221e-f1fe-4490-9c94-ad578f54413dTimeline Phase Duration: 14sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: de54221e-f1fe-4490-9c94-ad578f54413dGroup Index: 0
                          • +
                            371.Astarion: The point is I have history with these barbarians. Cazador's sending a message.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6ba024b5-8dca-4a4b-957b-0266a73768adSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hf92751fbg805cg4df9g91d8gc0e9ec427950Text UUID: 405424d0-37c7-4c14-87d8-5b9687807d67Group ID: de54221e-f1fe-4490-9c94-ad578f54413dGroup Index: 1
                            • See Node 650 Jump to Node 56
                      • +
                        846.Player: Why would monster hunters serve Cazador? He's a vampire!ORI_Astarion_Knows_CazadorVampireLord

                        Flags and Tags

                        checktype Global
                        • ORI_Astarion_Knows_CazadorVampireLord {64108cca-c858-443f-a224-04b51e034367} = True

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: faf8e34e-6e3e-4616-b7ba-521f821c2476Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h807e1421gcb89g4febgb668g5b68a09d8ae2Text UUID: db0b9d03-a2e6-4f22-9384-a4270ddd3aaeShow Once: True
                        • +
                          489.Astarion: They may have no idea who they're working for. Cazador likely paid someone to pay someone to call in a favour, and here we are.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 92f3c092-1a2d-4fad-9fe8-44b1d6db7d04Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hab78e0ecgdd45g4645g8084g1792157f6f86Text UUID: 073c6b3e-be69-485f-b1bc-88d10752d598Timeline Phase Index: 91Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 92f3c092-1a2d-4fad-9fe8-44b1d6db7d04Timeline Phase Duration: 30.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 92f3c092-1a2d-4fad-9fe8-44b1d6db7d04Group Index: 0
                          • +
                            753.Astarion: He doesn't do simple plans. Not if he has a complex one that pits a dozen enemies against each other.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: dd3f92ac-cc80-44b7-a629-5e7ad91176edSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h0acf7dc7gd639g4831g8a1eg39adbb655834Text UUID: 2ddb1cea-05d6-4edd-8f89-15ca3ff4e318Group ID: 92f3c092-1a2d-4fad-9fe8-44b1d6db7d04Group Index: 1
                            • +
                              577.Astarion: No, this hunter is a message. Cazador's letting me know that even out here, he can get to me. He wants me back.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a95193d9-1304-446c-839c-4cbda41bbcb1Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h0f14fdc2g8447g4a85gb7b4g2007d50f9a54Text UUID: 5349b6f6-9014-43c1-a7b8-9534263218e0Group ID: 92f3c092-1a2d-4fad-9fe8-44b1d6db7d04Group Index: 2
                              • +
                                734.Player: But why capture you? Why not just kill you?

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d75174eb-421f-43dd-8fd6-42ca53c55e6cSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hab158981ge60fg40b9g895fg5276cf970135Text UUID: 1fe8946b-50d0-4a4b-9f7e-11aab9392ec3Show Once: True
                                • +
                                  633.Astarion: Maybe he wants to make an example of me. To show what happens to runaways.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b740fd28-3780-4178-ae5c-05996908972bSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h26a770b8g58acg4a10g96fcgc1b6a68b94c5Text UUID: bab5d6ec-e61b-4fd7-82ba-9471837b68c9Timeline Phase Index: 145Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b740fd28-3780-4178-ae5c-05996908972bTimeline Phase Duration: 4.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                  • +
                                    52.Astarion: Or maybe he thinks death is too good for me.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0dcd05c5-c3d6-4d1c-8aec-51798b0d8f0aSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: heed78264g064eg4dddga27cgb6edcc67e56aText UUID: 42de4c50-64c8-44b7-b11e-bc3d7962a483Timeline Phase Index: 217Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0dcd05c5-c3d6-4d1c-8aec-51798b0d8f0aTimeline Phase Duration: 4sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                    • +
                                      161.Player: Well, you're safe with me.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2b015364-c4cc-4d6c-8357-a328470b0d9bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h59746e40g61adg4aa5g9040gd38d10844375Text UUID: 4f779de5-351a-4dd7-b9b0-2b85ee64fa7aShow Once: True
                                      • +
                                        220.Astarion: Safe? You think I'm safe?ORI_Astarion_Knows_CazadorVampireLord

                                        Flags and Tags

                                        checktype Global
                                        • ORI_Astarion_Knows_CazadorVampireLord {64108cca-c858-443f-a224-04b51e034367} = True

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3b58a210-dedd-4f34-b6be-5e4a3946698fSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h824bca4dgc5fdg41cfg8918g012dba56e549Text UUID: 7d9733b3-42a7-4f7f-8ca5-145fe73c9bd4Timeline Phase Index: 218Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3b58a210-dedd-4f34-b6be-5e4a3946698fTimeline Phase Duration: 9.01sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 3b58a210-dedd-4f34-b6be-5e4a3946698fGroup Index: 0
                                        • +
                                          70.Astarion: Do you know the power a vampire lord possesses?

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 11b8b047-a462-4e56-ba1e-b8b475f998feSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hb17074e4g099eg4820ga73bg2ae0e2a14ffeText UUID: 9e229741-0ef4-4cba-a0c7-efd295d8e4f7Group ID: 3b58a210-dedd-4f34-b6be-5e4a3946698fGroup Index: 1
                                          • +
                                            259.Astarion: He can change shape; turn into mist; call wolves to do his bidding; shrug off blows like they're nothing.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4a3fbd52-3d02-4189-b87b-d4aae88616f3Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h6bd0ecb1g5738g46f1g8ce7g2de34dc0d059Text UUID: d9854df1-ae51-4c36-9763-af4f65b2af26Timeline Phase Index: 179Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4a3fbd52-3d02-4189-b87b-d4aae88616f3Timeline Phase Duration: 15sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 4a3fbd52-3d02-4189-b87b-d4aae88616f3Group Index: 0
                                            • +
                                              156.Astarion: He could walk into our camp tonight and kill you with his bare hands. And you'd be lucky if death was the worst thing that happened to you.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2886c060-cfd7-43b3-8e56-400f9d757292Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hd8b620e8g111eg41ceg93c8g25259749089dText UUID: 6ba8ba5b-1124-43ad-94c5-64f3b2fe5702Group ID: 4a3fbd52-3d02-4189-b87b-d4aae88616f3Group Index: 1
                                              • +
                                                254.Player: All right. What do you suggest?

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 49385146-c37c-4d58-b700-939dffc3f4a4Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb496ba61gd499g4e81g8ed9g25e8cfa1dabfText UUID: 7416a8ff-c5de-4cfc-aa56-59a968682aa2Show Once: True
                                                • +
                                                  16.Astarion: First, we have to - uh...

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 04af7a69-940f-4883-8a75-3a7324dbf9c0Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hc1db02b8gfda0g4e57ga44bga206ab50ee86Text UUID: c6f58fcd-37dd-4bc1-afa9-e8fc3f7ef84fTimeline Phase Index: 293Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 04af7a69-940f-4883-8a75-3a7324dbf9c0Timeline Phase Duration: 10.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 04af7a69-940f-4883-8a75-3a7324dbf9c0Group Index: 0
                                                  • +
                                                    594.Astarion: ...I don't know. If we kill his lackeys, he'll just send more.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: acca3f96-68f8-4716-88fa-01161096b95aSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hcc8847e4gb587g4a3cga91bg4759148373f9Text UUID: 9e0f91db-649e-4db2-b32b-6f0dc90fc520Group ID: 04af7a69-940f-4883-8a75-3a7324dbf9c0Group Index: 1
                                                    • +
                                                      432.Astarion: We just have to be vigilant. Keep our wits about us. And kill any monster hunters on sight.

                                                      Metadata

                                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7f3e79ec-f5b8-4b04-8398-62ca433824f2Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hbee67e0bg9fc6g48a6gaa5ag3944df598e82Text UUID: c2cb88f7-7804-4fd6-a6c0-b1c3997b9636Timeline Phase Index: 76Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7f3e79ec-f5b8-4b04-8398-62ca433824f2Timeline Phase Duration: 6.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                      • +
                                                        230.Astarion: We can probably make an exception for Wyll. Probably...ORI_Wyll_State_IsInParty!Wyll

                                                        Flags and Tags

                                                        checktype Global
                                                        • ORI_Wyll_State_IsInParty {3c0972ef-d7a4-46ac-abdd-0ce6aadd61b0} = True

                                                        • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956} = False

                                                        Metadata

                                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3e403fb4-6da8-4446-931b-a4fa45fd410bSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h51fc5febgcb7fg4c93gb768g4bd1e2cd1f90Text UUID: 435a2359-deaa-4eae-8957-20333894c0b2Timeline Phase Index: 289Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3e403fb4-6da8-4446-931b-a4fa45fd410bTimeline Phase Duration: 3.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Optional: True
                                                        • •

                                              • +
                                                121.Player: Can he do that? Just walk into our camp?

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 1fd5b94f-8016-4f69-b836-bd742ed370dfSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h376ba08fgc841g48fbgae08g7d471d4847fdText UUID: 1b849b5c-3f52-4892-a2fb-751c4904d29fShow Once: True
                                                • +
                                                  302.Astarion: Probably not. He has to rest in his crypt during the day. I've never known him to leave Baldur's Gate.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 56b79ffe-ba91-40eb-bb04-1f054531748aSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h1648c2abgb8f3g4e99ga02fg363c5760d1bcText UUID: 9c65959f-ace7-4478-8703-60ff237eba1fTimeline Phase Index: 255Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 56b79ffe-ba91-40eb-bb04-1f054531748aTimeline Phase Duration: 13.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Group ID: 56b79ffe-ba91-40eb-bb04-1f054531748aGroup Index: 0
                                                  • +
                                                    558.Astarion: But he has no end of lackeys. He'll send someone else in his place.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a5192feb-e6fc-44fe-ae15-281953eb9799Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hc60ba48fg0511g4ab9ga671g09649ba029a0Text UUID: d4df8d04-f181-46bd-b6ec-918f49d67a63Group ID: 56b79ffe-ba91-40eb-bb04-1f054531748aGroup Index: 1
                                                    • See Node 432 (Astarion) We just have to be vigilant. Keep our wits about us. And kill any monster hunters on sight.
                                              • +
                                                505.Player: The Blade can handle a bloodsucker.Wyll

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                                • Wyll {5f40def5-d3ec-4698-a367-01a339888956} = True

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 97ac72c7-a12e-49f9-a0d9-f5609d8c6e00Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h9ef5f3b8g3ce2g4c04g88f9g62ca7fe0c026Text UUID: e7cd1647-8e3b-482d-b33b-9fe94f98603cShow Once: True
                                                • +
                                                  628.Astarion: Trust me, he's like nothing you've handled before.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b613448c-5f12-4a12-997a-0ee2260df479Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h81722326gd0d4g4801g9da9g4e0ed2b35be6Text UUID: aa0416fb-6822-4156-9323-1e0456c81b33Timeline Phase Index: 143Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b613448c-5f12-4a12-997a-0ee2260df479Timeline Phase Duration: 5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                  • +
                                                    513.Astarion: Just trust me when I say we need to be careful. He'll send more lackeys - he has plenty of souls to command.

                                                    Metadata

                                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9972a45a-bb4c-4213-aa1c-b4979bf400ffSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h9890221eg997ag401fg9c88g1587eb6face9Text UUID: 3b4e959a-45fc-4200-a0ed-ddeccd76ae89Timeline Phase Index: 77Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9972a45a-bb4c-4213-aa1c-b4979bf400ffTimeline Phase Duration: 9.71sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                                    • See Node 432 (Astarion) We just have to be vigilant. Keep our wits about us. And kill any monster hunters on sight.
                                              • +
                                                581.Player: He sounds like a fine challenge.Lae'zel

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player
                                                • Lae'zel {b5682d1d-c395-489c-9675-1f9b0c328ea5} = True

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a9ea0068-812b-4329-bf02-db9e6869362aSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h7af86501gc311g4cb6gbfb5g0af6ba34da08Text UUID: 3fb76092-9f90-4a83-90a6-29ab34ccd271Show Once: True
                                                • +
                                                  383.Astarion: As much as I'd love to present his head to Vlaakith, you don't know what he's like.

                                                  Metadata

                                                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6ee2f15b-5418-4c7b-99a9-c9159a4471b0Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hd2df62c9g6b67g4bedga06cg73b11d7220a3Text UUID: 37cc9795-6348-438a-8aa3-b6b7a244f3fdTimeline Phase Index: 268Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6ee2f15b-5418-4c7b-99a9-c9159a4471b0Timeline Phase Duration: 7.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                                  • See Node 513 (Astarion) Just trust me when I say we need to be careful. He'll send more lackeys - he has plenty of souls to command.
                                              • +
                                                442.Player: Vampires aren't invincible. We could take him.!Minsc!Wyll!Lae'zel

                                                Flags and Tags

                                                checktype Tag | speaker 1 Player

                                                • +

                                        • See Node 259 (Astarion) He can change shape; turn into mist; call wolves to do his bidding; shrug off blows like they're nothing.

                    • +

          • See Node 327 (Astarion) Why? Because Cazador sent him - why else?
    • +
      810.Player: Are you really going to trust that devil to keep his word if we kill this orthon?!SHA_Orthon_Event_ClearGemOwnership!NIGHT_Astarion_RaphaelsRevelation!VISITEDREGION_INT_Main_A!SHA_Orthon_State_DefeatedOnceORI_Astarion_State_GotQuestFromRaphael+1 moreAstarion_InParty_Talked_RaphaelsQuest
