        343.Astarion: I'd trust a devil over a vampire any day. I think he likes us.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6200a344-d34c-7f24-abc2-803088c0e7c5Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hf81ad048gad9cg4df2ga150g68f1ab91fda9Text UUID: c7a1a453-4dd3-4078-a26f-85016dd1c8b4Timeline Phase Index: 245Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6200a344-d34c-7f24-abc2-803088c0e7c5Timeline Phase Duration: 8.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • +
          515.Player: I like him, too. But I'd never say it to his smarmy face.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 99d7958d-3aa9-33e3-05a7-0886997ae359Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h9ad794b9g5d0bg451dga6d7gcf12720a9836Text UUID: e78896dd-4d72-4fb2-b5b6-3337e03d8b41Show Once: True
          • +
            126.Astarion: Perhaps if we kill this orthon extra bloody, he'll invite us for tea and brandy back in his House.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 21626cb6-f8c8-3fb8-3b4f-354289e581beSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: he012205fg763dg4976gab06gc3cad98676ecText UUID: b100893c-f7d6-4926-be13-00511bd083b1Timeline Phase Index: 224Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 21626cb6-f8c8-3fb8-3b4f-354289e581beTimeline Phase Duration: 7sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
            • •

        • +
          171.Player: Just stay on your guard.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2cb51ab8-36c4-789d-5e78-0939bf2b5b39Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h200264cdg3c4eg449fg8cb2g7aa7f3214c79Text UUID: f67fe3f1-87b1-4b16-9595-7b1030fe722eShow Once: True
          • +
            455.Astarion: Am I not the very definition of 'careful'?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 85db539c-b7c6-db43-62ea-e3d55c3a9274Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hb3d080feg306dg4249g9d48g2a8f72516e4bText UUID: 4ce5edc8-ab54-48c2-9a66-87f2c859855aTimeline Phase Index: 79Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 85db539c-b7c6-db43-62ea-e3d55c3a9274Timeline Phase Duration: 5.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
            • See Node 363 Jump to Node 19
        • +
          347.Player: Devils will take everything they can get. And more besides.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 65f86c2e-91dd-7ca6-8250-2090722bc74bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hbce67b97g7ab8g4891ga47bgd327f22687b8Text UUID: 4ebba8fc-72e8-44d5-9128-5479d2453a97Show Once: True
          • +
            22.Astarion: Fret not, my soul is quite safe. I am not about to swap one master for another.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 06c03776-d8ed-7e72-c5a6-a919006c59d7Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hf4bd5f91gc0fcg4f5dga0a6g751fcd790d65Text UUID: 00016f74-4921-4df7-8a34-045eebbdcfc1Timeline Phase Index: 280Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 06c03776-d8ed-7e72-c5a6-a919006c59d7Timeline Phase Duration: 14.02sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 06c03776-d8ed-7e72-c5a6-a919006c59d7Group Index: 0
            • +
              850.Astarion: Even though he's using me, I'm using him, too. And what do I care about this orthon's life?

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fcc8639d-82b7-fe2f-91f1-af317d807b57Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h5597b8e8g958ag4ca2g972ag3fa62761102dText UUID: d3ece538-883a-4494-8741-667b686f7361Group ID: 06c03776-d8ed-7e72-c5a6-a919006c59d7Group Index: 1
              • See Node 363 Jump to Node 19
        • +
          772.Player: It's your only lead, I suppose.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e3eddf8c-da34-6313-a1ab-0bebfb6fe59cSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hf2f9b6c5g6fcdg4277gb148gc4834e2f8470Text UUID: 903369f3-b0d0-493c-951d-81f86e9f810eShow Once: True
          • +
            649.Astarion: This is the first chance I've had to decipher my scars. Be a dear, don't get in my way.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bb6d101f-0a3f-69d9-5c0f-5bbca3ca996eSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hcf50b415gb391g494eg99ffgbc82f24ae971Text UUID: e9f19878-d761-4af6-ab46-22288b38b12dTimeline Phase Index: 147Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bb6d101f-0a3f-69d9-5c0f-5bbca3ca996eTimeline Phase Duration: 8sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

          736.Astarion: Hopefully he bumps into some gnolls while stumbling around at night and that's the last we hear from him.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d7c8253f-2f8c-42b3-9d7a-d32d5dd81b47Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h0f5d6e0fg6054g40d6g9e61g97cf0ea10a7aText UUID: 9d0c2f21-fcd5-40df-b390-d742eab0f58cGroup ID: 06ecb015-ab4a-4c13-9dd8-5e43b3bd3f1aGroup Index: 1
          • +
            133.Player: The hunter said you were a vampire spawn...!ORI_Astarion_Knows_Vampireness

            Flags and Tags

            checktype Global
            • ORI_Astarion_Knows_Vampireness {43c71ab0-1aca-484a-950d-54106ae46da5} = False

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 246c4f04-836a-4fcc-9ace-d84df6512877Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h19a65e67g68afg4cc4g91d5gdbb962340083Text UUID: 1358b3ce-7204-46c6-bd84-f8fe10189d36Show Once: True
            • +
              229.Astarion: Well of course he did. 'I'm hunting a poor innocent for money' isn't exactly going to win sympathy, is it?

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3e392153-503f-41e8-b6bd-6981f59d462bSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h0db1e30ag3848g46d7ga2c5geb04032c899dText UUID: c68cfaaa-2029-4127-9287-1317f98fe429Timeline Phase Index: 239Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3e392153-503f-41e8-b6bd-6981f59d462bTimeline Phase Duration: 8.3sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
              • •
                511.Astarion: No, 'I'm here to save you from a monstrous vampire' - that's much more convincing.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 98f7a69a-ba39-4704-876f-8fc5a025c739Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h16b61564gf908g4cc0g9586g0b694e4974ccText UUID: 12d3b6ab-4a1b-47c4-b73f-51b4ef60d92bTimeline Phase Index: 100Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 98f7a69a-ba39-4704-876f-8fc5a025c739Timeline Phase Duration: 7sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
          • +
            666.Player: But why was he hunting you? What did you do?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c0313977-1a59-4c5d-9ffe-c222db01dd5aSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc7bf06ebg91e7g4040ga5cdgf11a7693a96dText UUID: 5783ebf1-a35e-44d0-a6d3-51401c6dc063Show Once: True
            • +
              457.Astarion: I didn't do anything! I was kidnapped - just like you.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 862ed5ed-f13a-479b-a969-cd794d1a80ffSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h24137cdag94d0g48bag9fd9gf972869fee3fText UUID: fb704b10-d005-410e-b484-d99c71792648Timeline Phase Index: 80Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 862ed5ed-f13a-479b-a969-cd794d1a80ffTimeline Phase Duration: 8.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 862ed5ed-f13a-479b-a969-cd794d1a80ffGroup Index: 0
              • +
                584.Astarion: It seems Cazador wants me back.782bba35-332f-41d6-9d8f-885bf45de054

                Flags and Tags

                settype Quest | speaker 1 Player
                • 782bba35-332f-41d6-9d8f-885bf45de054 = True

                • +
                  272.Player: And who is Cazador, exactly?!ORI_Astarion_Knows_CazadorMaster

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Global
                  • ORI_Astarion_Knows_CazadorMaster {7236c69b-fe20-afdb-a6fa-15c1fb9fb6ae} = False

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4e9b7734-fc3a-40ed-bd74-c37766bfddbaSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h16e0b723g9f2bg4556g8bd0gaefa78d15b53Text UUID: 495851b9-a689-4b6a-9429-df1ace3a358fShow Once: True
                  • +
                    531.Astarion: Cazador Szarr is a vampire lord in Baldur's Gate. The patriarch of his coven and a monster obsessed with power.ORI_Astarion_Knows_VampirenessORI_Astarion_Knows_CazadorVampireLordORI_Astarion_Knows_CazadorMaster

                    Flags and Tags

                    checktype Global
                    • ORI_Astarion_Knows_Vampireness {43c71ab0-1aca-484a-950d-54106ae46da5} = True
                    settype Global

                    • ORI_Astarion_Knows_CazadorMaster {7236c69b-fe20-afdb-a6fa-15c1fb9fb6ae} = True

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9e518626-7354-472c-a9c1-a032865a0b6eSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h2b5f3fe1g5ae6g4807g8fe8g7b48eeb1b376Text UUID: ff1d86e5-6ca6-4ffc-8a86-c10bb16be6bbTimeline Phase Index: 83Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9e518626-7354-472c-a9c1-a032865a0b6eTimeline Phase Duration: 19.01sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 9e518626-7354-472c-a9c1-a032865a0b6eGroup Index: 0
                    • •
                      468.Astarion: He turned me nearly two hundred years ago. I became his spawn and he became my tormentor.ORI_Astarion_Knows_Age8b87c643-481b-40db-9c04-327e54f6f5cb

                      Flags and Tags

                      settype Global
                      • ORI_Astarion_Knows_Age {3c531283-36e2-420f-9f46-2c6877ca3ddb} = True
                      settype Quest | speaker 1 Player
                      • 8b87c643-481b-40db-9c04-327e54f6f5cb = True

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 895dfb01-561f-fd74-21d5-9420cd43e4a7Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h26b5451bgbf12g4f01g9e87ga0c04f7f1465Text UUID: b3b74d48-704c-4aee-b6cc-509fe852c967Group ID: 9e518626-7354-472c-a9c1-a032865a0b6eGroup Index: 1
                  • +
                    840.Astarion: Ah, yes, you don't know. Cazador is a - a slaver in Baldur's Gate.ORI_Astarion_Knows_CazadorMaster

                    Flags and Tags

                    settype Global
                    • ORI_Astarion_Knows_CazadorMaster {7236c69b-fe20-afdb-a6fa-15c1fb9fb6ae} = True

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fa5c5021-19eb-4be7-8bbf-d4e273a14457Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hd53e65e1gdb69g43a3gbf78g67c76134a4c9Text UUID: 52151856-432e-480e-a4b0-7e609f8db879Timeline Phase Index: 122Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fa5c5021-19eb-4be7-8bbf-d4e273a14457Timeline Phase Duration: 9.96sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                    • +
                      557.Astarion: He captured me a long time ago. Insisted I call him 'master' - I only escaped when the mind flayers snatched me away from him.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a5175e95-b226-4eb2-bf07-52cbbec8f7adSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: haf1706f5g0e3eg491cgb91bg10b6dea2b475Text UUID: 768caf8d-2c6c-4be8-a2a2-49e3968138d1Timeline Phase Index: 56Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a5175e95-b226-4eb2-bf07-52cbbec8f7adTimeline Phase Duration: 13sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                      • •
                        182.Astarion: I shouldn't be surprised Cazador's hunting me. He always was quite... obsessive.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2e62a7dd-8c47-492a-aecb-6d4d6f4e98efSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hc8f57445ga26cg49bdgb71dg46e4fc3fb64fText UUID: 33853bcc-b3a7-42f9-b0bc-e75b33fb03d8Timeline Phase Index: 195Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2e62a7dd-8c47-492a-aecb-6d4d6f4e98efTimeline Phase Duration: 8sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                • +
                  313.Player: Cazador? The hunter said he was working for 'Ulma', the leader of his tribe.ORI_Astarion_Knows_CazadorMasterORI_Astarion_Knows_MaidenFel

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Global

                  • +
                    824.Astarion: He did. This 'Ulma' might be worth talking to.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f459b71e-2ac5-4429-9c49-d781f9cc4eacSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hbd4babc7g67b8g41bfg919ag7f32a3f601f6Text UUID: 73eebd22-c2b2-4ff0-8c25-0729543c7b89Timeline Phase Index: 210Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f459b71e-2ac5-4429-9c49-d781f9cc4eacTimeline Phase Duration: 21.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: f459b71e-2ac5-4429-9c49-d781f9cc4eacGroup Index: 0
                    • +
                      81.Astarion: Or killing. They're both good options.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 13bb7d7e-3faf-4ef5-83c8-bff70bfd4123Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hd242d62fg0d26g4391g98c8gb2716c3dee54Text UUID: a8c66e80-e860-4020-abfc-0c32f3d006ecGroup ID: f459b71e-2ac5-4429-9c49-d781f9cc4eacGroup Index: 1
                      • +
                        372.Astarion: But trust me, whoever the hunter thought he was working for, Cazador was pulling the strings. Only he would know to send the Gur after me.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6bbcb425-14c2-450c-988e-5dea9eefdf48Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h0c5b97dege1efg4ea0g8471gb39a13ecc7deText UUID: a83f19b6-7948-4025-9680-ec59ecf579b4Group ID: f459b71e-2ac5-4429-9c49-d781f9cc4eacGroup Index: 2

                  714.Player: You're sure Cazador's behind this?ORI_Astarion_Knows_CazadorMaster!ORI_Astarion_Knows_MaidenFel

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Global

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d102c240-a936-4de6-8a8b-488a1c273b99Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb07ee24cg4aabg4db3ga99agca3d5e8579a8Text UUID: 62092ee4-334b-4eac-bf1f-dc20981f32e8Show Once: True
                  • +
                    699.Astarion: It was him, I'm sure. Only he would know to send the Gur after me.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cc4f3168-8b38-4392-8b30-097dc0a4cd98Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h8cd94bceg740fg4f2ag9ccfga6d7f1453222Text UUID: da641121-5820-479b-84fc-e7807e6da924Timeline Phase Index: 157Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cc4f3168-8b38-4392-8b30-097dc0a4cd98Timeline Phase Duration: 7sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                    • See Node 461 (No Speaker) Alias to Node 90
                    • See Node 334 (No Speaker) Alias to Node 2
                • +
                  136.Player: It was bad enough running from the mind flayers. Now your past is chasing us too?

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2498a98e-3028-4ee2-9fa6-8c6945dd5585Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h76cfb367gdd7ag4b94g9b39g30da24a56730Text UUID: 0596bb00-0c20-468f-95f1-0817cbe3f62cShow Once: True
                  • +
                    373.Astarion: I'm not happy about it either, you know. Especially for one of them to turn up.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6beda38a-2b48-418a-87f0-21578c0fd771Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h630016e5g7d69g48f1gafc4gc273db00d2adText UUID: e046d22f-77aa-434a-8393-ff2c6871d15eTimeline Phase Index: 264Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6beda38a-2b48-418a-87f0-21578c0fd771Timeline Phase Duration: 6sTimeline Phase Shots: 1

            341.Player: What if he reappears?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 603dea75-2bad-40dd-94ce-3449597268c2Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h63a57513g5a4ag4600g8400gd70ca6e59038Text UUID: fa0ff2a9-27e5-45c3-bc53-b72888d331fcShow Once: True
            • +
              422.Astarion: Then we kill him. I thought that would've been obvious.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7aea1d8a-82e8-4503-a2e0-8a330c51767bSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h78ea62b5g9b6dg413eg8eafge52095d29e09Text UUID: edf9314b-9d3d-4c09-a58b-41eaf00dd891Timeline Phase Index: 57Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7aea1d8a-82e8-4503-a2e0-8a330c51767bTimeline Phase Duration: 13.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 7aea1d8a-82e8-4503-a2e0-8a330c51767bGroup Index: 0
              • +
                448.Astarion: There may be others, of course. If Cazador sent one peon after me, he'll send more.782bba35-332f-41d6-9d8f-885bf45de054

                Flags and Tags

                settype Quest | speaker 1 Player
                • 782bba35-332f-41d6-9d8f-885bf45de054 = True

          • +
            550.Player: The next time someone comes looking for you, you're on your own.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a373c450-9293-4b06-9c0b-57dc32f9cb22Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h9fd4ed09g8d7ag4a9egb1ddg30d55f371443Text UUID: 908d3998-afd4-49a3-812d-d3ccbb39cc4fShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: 349fb697-5dcb-4de5-a800-9f96685c014d
            • +
              608.Astarion: I appreciate your loyalty, darling, but I don't think you understand. My old master sent that vagabond after me.782bba35-332f-41d6-9d8f-885bf45de054

              Flags and Tags

              settype Quest | speaker 1 Player
              • 782bba35-332f-41d6-9d8f-885bf45de054 = True

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b1e8dc8a-4613-4578-a84f-8f7f1c38ebe1Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h3ec88e5cgf5e3g429bg8e4fgbfcf60fbae70Text UUID: 75f5ea14-a5ab-4b2a-84d6-c78135e56586Timeline Phase Index: 134Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b1e8dc8a-4613-4578-a84f-8f7f1c38ebe1Timeline Phase Duration: 10.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
              • +
                4.Astarion: It was a mob of Gur that left me half-dead two hundred years ago. That left me begging Cazador to turn me so I could survive to take revenge.ORI_Astarion_Knows_VampirenessORI_Astarion_Knows_Age

                Flags and Tags

                checktype Global
                • ORI_Astarion_Knows_Vampireness {43c71ab0-1aca-484a-950d-54106ae46da5} = True
                settype Global
                • ORI_Astarion_Knows_Age {3c531283-36e2-420f-9f46-2c6877ca3ddb} = True

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 00979c37-9760-4344-b922-2cc1fde7b464Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hfd0eb2bcgd8bbg4da4g8948ge4675b63a781Text UUID: 70001cbb-51f3-4d03-a45f-506baa27ac19Timeline Phase Index: 271Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 00979c37-9760-4344-b922-2cc1fde7b464Timeline Phase Duration: 11sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
                • +
                  472.Astarion: And if that old bastard wants me back, he won't ask whose side you're on before slaughtering you.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8c506a1a-111b-4fcb-af94-859e17b4d205Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h90b5cebcg7ef1g4063g9335g55b5a61c92d6Text UUID: 84922711-e843-47ed-ae91-797eaa154df3Timeline Phase Index: 85Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8c506a1a-111b-4fcb-af94-859e17b4d205Timeline Phase Duration: 7sTimeline Phase Shots: 2

        629.Astarion: He was. But now he's not, which is all that matters, really.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b66498c5-1f1d-4536-8933-36ade0d436e4Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h72d2b507g5b35g4a75ga440g7d7143bfd5d4Text UUID: bf93d572-d8a9-4c60-8619-696a79e5f2b8Timeline Phase Index: 144Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b66498c5-1f1d-4536-8933-36ade0d436e4Timeline Phase Duration: 5.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • See Node 133 (Player) The hunter said you were a vampire spawn...
        • See Node 666 (Player) But why was he hunting you? What did you do?
        • +
          686.Player: What if there are others? He might not have been alone.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c6baba4f-45e6-4acb-920f-151f2b6a83a3Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4612e8a7g5a38g4c27g9f79gdcc1546b037aText UUID: b594be96-1e58-435f-87c1-153bb699e149Show Once: True
          • +
            374.Astarion: Oh, there'll be others. I'm sure of that.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6c804578-ce31-4fa7-a54e-794309062571Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h0d27f537gbba7g4f7bgb887gc3119fd74458Text UUID: 8f7cc8e5-6583-4b89-b514-48d6c6f3dd2bTimeline Phase Index: 257Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6c804578-ce31-4fa7-a54e-794309062571Timeline Phase Duration: 9.51sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 6c804578-ce31-4fa7-a54e-794309062571Group Index: 0

      859.Player: You should know, I told that monster hunter where our camp was.!GLO_GurHunter_State_PermaDefeatedHAG_GurHunter_Knows_CampLocation!ORI_Astarion_State_WarnedAboutGurHunterAttackAstarion_InParty_Asked_GurHunterORI_Astarion_State_WarnedAboutGurHunterAttack

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ffa434e0-092e-ac4e-d6c9-fc8abe01a75bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h08784912g959cg45f4g8a5cgd51ed306b672Text UUID: a494cc0f-4f07-445a-9700-297d97c6c208Show Once: True
      • +
        458.Astarion: What? Why? Why would you do that?!

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 86c6dc6c-522d-9351-bad9-f5253135c2f9Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h3148796cg85bfg41bcg8283g3bbeed617ebfText UUID: 6e4c1891-9e89-4683-8f9e-ff8ade08dd5eTimeline Phase Index: 81Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 86c6dc6c-522d-9351-bad9-f5253135c2f9Timeline Phase Duration: 4sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • +
          600.Player: To lure him into an ambush. We can defeat him together.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ae587ac0-475f-f1ab-0ab7-96bee99cfcceSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5d9e1a78gce22g4466gb8c7g25a0e44825d5Text UUID: 046cfc4e-5a53-4a46-80a9-08f05792154aShow Once: True
          • +
            652.Astarion: A sweet thought, but if he approaches a half-empty camp, he'll know something's wrong and bolt.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bbc081ff-a7e9-102e-24c9-d631c4dcaa95Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h5984c08fgb683g42a7gbea7g4d6a527ac831Text UUID: 0641a411-2bab-4a80-b929-1a42deff0049Timeline Phase Index: 72Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bbc081ff-a7e9-102e-24c9-d631c4dcaa95Timeline Phase Duration: 24sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: bbc081ff-a7e9-102e-24c9-d631c4dcaa95Group Index: 0
            • +
              555.Astarion: Besides, this is... personal. It's better if I handle it alone.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a4e4b9c3-90ac-f555-25d2-674f63f3ba10Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h4d7d739dg27fbg46c3gaa36g145e251a5162Text UUID: 1a10207a-8aeb-4a08-85ef-2f45c7960a55Group ID: bbc081ff-a7e9-102e-24c9-d631c4dcaa95Group Index: 1
              • +
                692.Astarion: You go to bed as normal, I'll take first watch tonight. And if he appears, I'll be happy to take care of him.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cabbcc38-cd17-a38d-e083-036fcf2ca1bbSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h77413157g10bag477ag806dg4707236aba5dText UUID: 969fe0b3-6d90-4f7e-80ad-65635a986051Group ID: bbc081ff-a7e9-102e-24c9-d631c4dcaa95Group Index: 2
                • •
                  731.Jump to Node 19

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: JumpUUID: d6d2ee81-184f-9a86-d3b1-1c9eb008037dJump Target: Node 19 (05b247e0-98eb-4dbe-881e-7f4fa622af86)Jump Target Point: 2
        • +
          777.Player: He's a monster hunter. You're a monster. Seemed fair?ORI_Astarion_Knows_Vampireness

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Global
          • ORI_Astarion_Knows_Vampireness {43c71ab0-1aca-484a-950d-54106ae46da5} = True

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e49d20dc-e695-9867-e136-42c82166e645Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h82860933g2316g466dg9345gd4b45b598619Text UUID: 7e8bbc88-f68d-47b7-a1e9-8ec9afb9e173Show Once: True
          • +
            13.Astarion: Fair? Nothing about this is fair. Least of all what you've done.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 02f9ac2a-0e02-238e-7f2b-0bb80a0a2ab7Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hffa732d7gdba0g4559g9676g0b366402e885Text UUID: 26334ecf-73e4-4c34-a38e-18b3707c4f92Timeline Phase Index: 303Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 02f9ac2a-0e02-238e-7f2b-0bb80a0a2ab7Timeline Phase Duration: 10.34sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 02f9ac2a-0e02-238e-7f2b-0bb80a0a2ab7Group Index: 0
            • +
              528.Astarion: If he can find me, anyone can. You've left me exposed.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9d5419d3-b3e9-1911-0946-e156b960ab04Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hae0def2fgb266g46aeg8a31gdb2ef7d2390bText UUID: 24bdc571-7db5-40fc-a6b0-83065cb17070Group ID: 02f9ac2a-0e02-238e-7f2b-0bb80a0a2ab7Group Index: 1
              • +
                301.Astarion: I won't be caught and dragged back like some animal.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5641f37c-5cce-0683-3efc-b1ba15f5452bSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h8f138b17g5286g4574gb1e0gf82552cc9191Text UUID: 9d279313-351c-4321-b224-94840bfffca7Timeline Phase Index: 315Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5641f37c-5cce-0683-3efc-b1ba15f5452bTimeline Phase Duration: 16.17sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: 5641f37c-5cce-0683-3efc-b1ba15f5452bGroup Index: 0
                • •
                  499.Astarion: When I return to Baldur's Gate, it will be on my terms. And if I can't trust you to help me, then I'll figure it out myself. [End]GLO_Companion_Leave

                  Flags and Tags

                  settype Object | speaker 0 Astarion
                  • GLO_Companion_Leave {363c71f4-8b46-c0c0-4bbb-0e5a85e4652d} = True

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 960a9cb0-0b6d-1eaa-bf96-3c0fd3a5285dSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hb6e3a04eg5f45g43f9gbc47g0bf9b548949bText UUID: 99a13e6a-8555-494d-aff5-c7158b310e53End Node: TrueGroup ID: 5641f37c-5cce-0683-3efc-b1ba15f5452bGroup Index: 1
        • +
          316.Player: I wanted to see who'd win.!ORI_Astarion_Knows_Vampireness

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Global
          • ORI_Astarion_Knows_Vampireness {43c71ab0-1aca-484a-950d-54106ae46da5} = False

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5a6de1e1-0cd2-0994-cdd0-41c1d1e06a38Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h1252665ege9f3g4da8g8bafg662282fec079Text UUID: 695219e6-187a-41ae-8dec-ed2de76d0501Show Once: True
          • +
            202.Astarion: No one's going to win, because there won't be a fight.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 36ebdc7e-ea03-3fab-7d4c-966ec530a369Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h904bb72bga86eg4cdag9c1bg6b8954c67915Text UUID: 6c2a01ef-1052-416d-aa7f-9a52683321e5Timeline Phase Index: 190Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 36ebdc7e-ea03-3fab-7d4c-966ec530a369Timeline Phase Duration: 5.02sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
            • See Node 301 (Astarion) I won't be caught and dragged back like some animal.
        • +
          694.Player: Maybe you deserved it.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: cb1bf12f-fd99-91b1-aae7-75399c073fe4Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc05c7bfdgbfa8g4976g898agd535f94a6a66Text UUID: e53c6d17-c607-4a10-b21b-7b8d5f3b35b4Show Once: True
          • +
            546.Astarion: I deserve better than anything that bounty hunter has planned for me, I promise you that.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a29049f3-1903-1c7e-3322-0c280b982851Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hdb63ac87g2708g4623g9a1dgeb71b1f1de83Text UUID: 699f439c-607c-4493-becb-eb9e3e2151e1Timeline Phase Index: 68Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a29049f3-1903-1c7e-3322-0c280b982851Timeline Phase Duration: 5.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
            • See Node 301 (Astarion) I won't be caught and dragged back like some animal.
    • +

        Metadata

        • +

          831.Player: That doesn't answer why.

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f6d15a5e-e7fe-ee5b-3f20-196b2ad119f3Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h666de64bg0c16g4ecag8bb8gc92ed7a91b4aText UUID: 4eea156f-002c-4851-8d88-3fe7ff44d4c5Show Once: True
          • +
            72.Astarion: Let me worry about the why. The Gur are duplicitous reprobates. Gods know what he was really after.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 11f6ad0e-65de-b51d-0d75-3b07abe9f619Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h9463022bg12d9g4c9eg954cgf6a226475e0eText UUID: 051c4b99-4840-4681-a125-06e3a7e13835Timeline Phase Index: 211Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 11f6ad0e-65de-b51d-0d75-3b07abe9f619Timeline Phase Duration: 8.23sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
            • See Node 64 (Astarion) He won't bother us anymore. Now I've made sure of it.
        • +
          722.Player: No more impressive than you usually are.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d489cd8a-c3f5-5a98-940a-478e1b1181feSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hbed4f2d6gf9ecg46ebg9679ge669f967f6b4Text UUID: 880c0a37-8f74-4081-b451-bd8caef43958Show Once: True
          • +
            627.Astarion: Aren't you just obsessed? And here I am, not even trying.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b5fd2412-87f1-d6fb-a876-a94c2cc7f33bSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h948ea521gf798g4967g88a3gb9a607bbebaeText UUID: 4a6222e9-de79-4884-b949-bd4ec985c01dTimeline Phase Index: 142Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b5fd2412-87f1-d6fb-a876-a94c2cc7f33bTimeline Phase Duration: 6.18sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
            • See Node 64 (Astarion) He won't bother us anymore. Now I've made sure of it.

            288.Astarion: Swear you'll look after me, and perhaps I won't need to go poking around with my knife.

          291.Astarion: I don't know who they are, but I have plenty of questions.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 54400e69-291c-42c9-811e-4266fc281847Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h37aac404ge26fg4d9bg98b9g48025e8feff2Text UUID: 9dac2600-c5e6-4361-991c-15529a3f9d96Group ID: 3e073f81-9e36-46da-ab24-f78a807f33c3Group Index: 1
      • +
        572.Astarion: Who knows? Drow? Mind flayers? Death? Hopefully not ours.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a8373cdf-bafb-4a19-bb7c-a4c9362a3592Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h9b49b49ag14f0g440eg99f8g9b6161f92560Text UUID: 3298ecbb-f231-4933-9e8d-b2ee24a97e17Timeline Phase Index: 236Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a8373cdf-bafb-4a19-bb7c-a4c9362a3592Timeline Phase Duration: 14.01sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: a8373cdf-bafb-4a19-bb7c-a4c9362a3592Group Index: 0
        • •

      • +
        154.Astarion: I won't lie, it's tempting. If I keep the tadpole, I risk transforming into a grotesque monster.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 28362923-1e4f-4e44-a603-17e2fd00982dSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h811dc02ag8c12g4c10gb5fcg1672445591beText UUID: 6ad4d5ce-8efa-4e14-9678-6ea3f2ef7cc4Timeline Phase Index: 177Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 28362923-1e4f-4e44-a603-17e2fd00982dTimeline Phase Duration: 28.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 28362923-1e4f-4e44-a603-17e2fd00982dGroup Index: 0
        • +
          169.Astarion: If I lose the tadpole, Cazador has control of me, body and soul, and I return to the shadows.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2c546427-e4d0-41c0-827b-3285bef21bc3Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h11beba53g52bfg4c59g9e6cg33e621bf91ebText UUID: 6bd16c4e-0ee5-489a-8144-57d140e56f9cGroup ID: 28362923-1e4f-4e44-a603-17e2fd00982dGroup Index: 1
          • +
            437.Astarion: It's grim either way, so why not sell what's left of my soul to a devil? Better he has it than Cazador.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8105afe8-499d-435b-b8ac-5e5a7ee24b10Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h1a594488gdc11g48caga3c2g21de6a91f9adText UUID: 74e41790-58c2-4904-8dfb-d20b54206f53Group ID: 28362923-1e4f-4e44-a603-17e2fd00982dGroup Index: 2
            • +
              578.Player: We have other options. Better options.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a972b189-ad9c-4706-a1e1-9e43884e83f7Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h7680a40fg7d44g41b4g9cb2ge91c56ea9913Text UUID: 0792ed3c-3fc7-41d2-bd08-caa593e91947Show Once: True
              • +
                258.Astarion: Figuring out what's happening to us, confronting a god called 'the Absolute', and then finding the time to kill my old master before he can control me once more?

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4a380cb0-db17-4ab7-b7f5-b0361fbe2926Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h42af3448g11deg4823ga2e7g6621c2057d03Text UUID: c56287d6-7140-489d-bf0a-cb7075394a8aTimeline Phase Index: 277Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4a380cb0-db17-4ab7-b7f5-b0361fbe2926Timeline Phase Duration: 13sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 4a380cb0-db17-4ab7-b7f5-b0361fbe2926Group Index: 0
                • +
                  350.Astarion: Yes, that's an option. But I wouldn't bet eternity on it.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 66c99179-b87a-4db6-83cb-82434a8e45afSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hbb1057f3g0b82g4e75ga6ecgcfe5ca154f8dText UUID: d50e824f-929c-41ab-965c-7797a13c1cdbGroup ID: 4a380cb0-db17-4ab7-b7f5-b0361fbe2926Group Index: 1

              604.Player: I understand the appeal.

              Metadata

                611.Astarion: I'm glad to hear it. Whatever's coming, we need to keep our options open.

                Metadata

              130.Player: You're trading one master for another - you'll be a slave either way.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 23d0c40b-bb68-4c1c-aa44-ecdd3a509ebbSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hfcb513abgcedbg4604g8dd4g8b927938c785Text UUID: f5dec02e-3e8a-4e8c-8bad-5c4595585a8aShow Once: True
              • +
                603.Astarion: You're familiar with the phrase 'better the devil you know'?

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: af2a8c7c-95d5-43aa-9197-2f43cf86208eSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hdf75c925g98f3g48a4gbed5g010826f0462eText UUID: ba417a7a-3f52-4f21-bf0a-bf51cc6f77b8Timeline Phase Index: 188Timeline Dialog Node UUID: af2a8c7c-95d5-43aa-9197-2f43cf86208eTimeline Phase Duration: 9.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: af2a8c7c-95d5-43aa-9197-2f43cf86208eGroup Index: 0
                • +
                  210.Astarion: I know Cazador. And I'll take anything that saves me from that.

      335.Player: Consider telling him you worship Shar.!ShadowHeart_InParty_Knows_SharWorshipperShadowheart

        542.Astarion: What do you mean 'dead'? How? Why?!Astarion_InParty_Talked_NoAstarionCazadorResolution

        Flags and Tags

        settype Dialog | speaker 1 Player

        • +
          718.Player: I killed him. You're free.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d2715e64-f7c5-c250-d222-25c6c5dce637Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h18b8f7cdg9642g467eg8350g3d75b44f0673Text UUID: 22f5b574-90f7-4744-be1b-47267a888dceShow Once: True
          • +
            858.Astarion: Free? I'm not free - I'm trapped!

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ff66f0d9-9b50-9523-ee32-bee589e4318bSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h11768080g411fg4a24ga87fg8aea29fe61b3Text UUID: 2138ed42-6ed0-4bdd-b19d-8fb6ebfef367Timeline Phase Index: 304Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ff66f0d9-9b50-9523-ee32-bee589e4318bTimeline Phase Duration: 25sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: ff66f0d9-9b50-9523-ee32-bee589e4318bGroup Index: 0
            • +
              607.Astarion: I'll never be anything but a spawn now. You've sentenced me to an eternity in darkness.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b1da9035-d586-beb8-964a-98fc3df9f095Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hf59e7f40g8af3g4127gabecgbefcbfd23afbText UUID: d3b46690-4216-4ef3-b164-7a049c48725eGroup ID: ff66f0d9-9b50-9523-ee32-bee589e4318bGroup Index: 1
              • +
                281.Astarion: Tell me honestly, did you kill him for my sake or to stop me completing the ritual myself?

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 514b9ad1-8825-f817-f679-93e83129e0e6Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h1512719dg7137g4b36gb6b1g2a4f5742527fText UUID: 9c72fb47-a730-4ab6-bfd2-b85db4f5562cGroup ID: ff66f0d9-9b50-9523-ee32-bee589e4318bGroup Index: 2
                • +
                  271.Player: No, I did it for you. Because I wanted you to be safe.ORI_State_PartneredWithAstarion

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
                  • ORI_State_PartneredWithAstarion {30819c8d-b39d-42e7-acd1-2a8c2c309994} = True

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 4da04033-d7ce-848a-f75a-afee67fa80bcSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h59cec867g664ag408eg8f84g85bbec8bf652Text UUID: 9b212cfa-30a0-4c91-9320-f8b2441ddfecShow Once: True
                  • +
                    601.Astarion: I - ...I do believe you. I know you only did what you thought was best for me.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: aea1786c-442f-3fa2-19c7-83cc522299d1Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hc2e0bea9g32aeg4860ga478g239a59397babText UUID: 3decf3f0-8dca-4247-b0a5-45e6385c5192Timeline Phase Index: 263Timeline Dialog Node UUID: aea1786c-442f-3fa2-19c7-83cc522299d1Timeline Phase Duration: 22.08sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: aea1786c-442f-3fa2-19c7-83cc522299d1Group Index: 0
                    • +
                      396.Astarion: And who knows - maybe this is what's best? The kind of power that ritual offered could ruin a person. Even me.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 72f48436-424f-f034-d3a0-fcfc284d9f17Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hb8a3ca44g03b7g4a98g8802g32629d231a9aText UUID: aabe280d-df09-4ea4-ae64-205083af58d3Group ID: aea1786c-442f-3fa2-19c7-83cc522299d1Group Index: 1
                      • +
                        798.Astarion: Gods, I would have liked to kill him, though.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: eb20af9e-1a9c-a5cb-d3ac-7b3706747cdbSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hf973b67bgb720g4760gbdcdg890e62101efcText UUID: e5677d0b-5767-418c-bd6f-a519c82ccc7eTimeline Phase Index: 110Timeline Dialog Node UUID: eb20af9e-1a9c-a5cb-d3ac-7b3706747cdbTimeline Phase Duration: 7sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                        • +
                          784.Player: Trust me, this was for the best.

                          Metadata

                          • +
                            563.Astarion: I will have to trust you on that.

                        • +

                            46.Astarion: You know, on some level, it does.

                          411.Player: You should know, Cazador turned the victims you brought him to spawn. They were sacrifices for the ritual.LOW_CazadorsPalace_Cells_NoAstarion_Knows_AstarionBroughtPrisonersAstarion_InParty_Asked_RevealedSpawnPrisoners

                          Flags and Tags

                          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 777a86ad-1f40-dd62-8bd4-b6f514f1b187Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h7ea82455gca77g4098ga188g4ba5728a186bText UUID: 48624984-77da-4b12-b8ea-760e07e442e6Show Once: True
                          • +
                            726.Astarion: They - they were alive? All this time, they were just hidden under the palace?

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d534cd1a-05be-c2d6-09f7-ec7141666888Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hc9b91d51g5903g4c37gac63ga459dba324edText UUID: c0ada614-55d5-441d-b63e-78e6c8b7df03Timeline Phase Index: 300Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d534cd1a-05be-c2d6-09f7-ec7141666888Timeline Phase Duration: 20.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: d534cd1a-05be-c2d6-09f7-ec7141666888Group Index: 0
                            • +
                              583.Astarion: Hells. After two centuries, Cazador still had new horrors to reveal.

                              Metadata

                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: aa875881-72ad-64a2-22b7-eff81aa11993Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h64302e75g3c41g4500g9790ge9b3104cd5e2Text UUID: f2fb4dfb-95b2-4558-98e1-1db4b849be37Group ID: d534cd1a-05be-c2d6-09f7-ec7141666888Group Index: 1
                              • +
                                18.Astarion: What did you do with the poor wretches?

                                Metadata

                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 057e213c-da10-388b-eecb-e3394ae906ccSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hc0eea5a0ge149g409bg9e8dga3e5aa905f70Text UUID: 0f7dd068-d226-4c22-806f-e308ff58bbceGroup ID: d534cd1a-05be-c2d6-09f7-ec7141666888Group Index: 2
                                • +
                                  96.Player: I set them free - they're in the Underdark now. LOW_CazadorsPalace_RitualRoom_State_ReleasedPrisoners

                                  Flags and Tags

                                  checktype Global
                                  • LOW_CazadorsPalace_RitualRoom_State_ReleasedPrisoners {5784cf70-bff9-467c-b150-39d1f5a78240} = True

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 16ebd14f-1d8e-0c0a-d8bb-f81656a558eaSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: he32f3031g6c6fg49bbg9b70g33180837c0cbText UUID: 96d02c9e-5eac-4d3d-8d17-c4b3d4ea7910Show Once: True
                                  • +
                                    748.Astarion: That was a kindness. I think? It's hard to know, really.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: db004724-1770-b1c1-62b1-870b0894621bSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: heceea881g02b8g4296gab62gbfb47ee98e63Text UUID: 2cd8d7b1-9092-47e4-aa4d-dfd17ed0a0bdTimeline Phase Index: 150Timeline Dialog Node UUID: db004724-1770-b1c1-62b1-870b0894621bTimeline Phase Duration: 5.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                    • +
                                      799.Astarion: I'm not sure if I feel worse for them or the creatures of the Underdark. But at least they're free.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: eb46e083-cb25-e988-3738-e95062d8e7fbSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h79b38133g8aedg4d83gbaf2g89f4e6173783Text UUID: 789f48d6-3509-4163-8636-2e6e8d3cd34eTimeline Phase Index: 111Timeline Dialog Node UUID: eb46e083-cb25-e988-3738-e95062d8e7fbTimeline Phase Duration: 5.98sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                      • +
                                        835.Astarion: Still, this will take some getting used to - Cazador being... gone.

                                        Metadata

                                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f7fe4e9f-bc45-7c1b-6cf7-87de16075a1cSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h740bc9a1g887dg41acg8aaag8b58c21af357Text UUID: e5bd04d9-c1d3-4cd2-974e-bd097be9a8caTimeline Phase Index: 120Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f7fe4e9f-bc45-7c1b-6cf7-87de16075a1cTimeline Phase Duration: 19.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: f7fe4e9f-bc45-7c1b-6cf7-87de16075a1cGroup Index: 0
                                        • +
                                          860.Astarion: I just need some time to let it sink in - to figure out what it means now that he's gone.

                                          Metadata

                                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ffc7189c-e853-9137-7d3d-fe89b2bc7733Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h3cef424cgc326g4291g8d24gd3d1f3584178Text UUID: 244a5be6-52e1-461c-9ac7-a68ab696c819Group ID: f7fe4e9f-bc45-7c1b-6cf7-87de16075a1cGroup Index: 1
                                          • +
                                            332.Player: Of course, take all the time you need.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5de2a25f-cd65-1cea-75c0-e4132707c954Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hbc4b506egaad5g46e3g9e05g5bd5827f36c8Text UUID: bd3f83d2-d513-48fa-9968-0d0602f2d8f1Show Once: True
                                            • +
                                              151.Astarion: Thank you. And thank you for what you did.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 27aa1b12-cced-7a3b-9b04-9b763a6902daSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h77c07d77gda83g4447ga316g5f410b70aaf1Text UUID: e0579b85-e75a-4730-a674-3e61ec7d4192Timeline Phase Index: 175Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 27aa1b12-cced-7a3b-9b04-9b763a6902daTimeline Phase Duration: 5.6sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                              • •
                                                592.Astarion: I thought Cazador's story would end with more of a bang than a whimper, but... well, you did end it. I'm grateful. [End]

                                                Metadata

                                                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ac3d1675-6d5c-dbf4-fe10-c0fc79634d1eSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hd5a4a13cgead9g485dg9cf5gca75f3bf8bedText UUID: f9ed0ee9-a42c-4bf8-b2e6-b6cd07b73f53Timeline Phase Index: 335Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ac3d1675-6d5c-dbf4-fe10-c0fc79634d1eTimeline Phase Duration: 14.53sTimeline Phase Shots: 3End Node: True
                                          • +
                                            308.Player: Don't worry, I'll accept those thanks whenever you're ready.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5857f004-7f63-2016-8794-64b1cef31379Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: had6789fbga437g40ceg8838g8e008a4241cdText UUID: 6b2e62f9-3a25-44bc-a177-b9ac0a5c23f8Show Once: True
                                            • +
                                              838.Astarion: You may be waiting a while. This has brought up some complicated feelings.

                                              Metadata

                                              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f9d5903b-bb78-1dd5-4ec4-22a4d7136938Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h5b85d9cfg6a28g426dg947aga0b1e5b5f88aText UUID: 782cb63a-13dc-4e9c-97dd-343d78bbb21aTimeline Phase Index: 121Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f9d5903b-bb78-1dd5-4ec4-22a4d7136938Timeline Phase Duration: 9.6sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                              • See Node 592 (Astarion) I thought Cazador's story would end with more of a bang than a whimper, but... well, you did end it. I'm grateful.
                                          • +
                                            830.Player: It's all right, I wanted to talk about something else anyway.

                                            Metadata

                                            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f6632cd1-e024-3838-b410-238a1794927eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h13025a4ag670cg46bcg903ag8cc09b78e034Text UUID: c0433e72-ebcc-4456-892f-8acfd5791b1dShow Once: True
                                            • +
                                              289.Astarion: You choose now to have a chat? This exact moment?

                                              Metadata

                                    • +
                                      545.Astarion: I suppose they're at peace, if nothing else. Or whatever passes for peace these days.

                                      Metadata

                                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a28d4ccb-80bf-198c-2dcd-527a1526b3fdSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h9306a9b2gad4dg4315ga5bbgfd39bdfe5172Text UUID: 21e1e931-460c-4a95-9d19-9019465f5b8eTimeline Phase Index: 67Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a28d4ccb-80bf-198c-2dcd-527a1526b3fdTimeline Phase Duration: 8.81sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                      • See Node 835 (Astarion) Still, this will take some getting used to - Cazador being... gone.
                                • +
                                  14.Player: They're still down there.LOW_CazadorsPalace_RitualRoom_State_LeftPrisonersRot

                                  Flags and Tags

                                  checktype Global
                                  • LOW_CazadorsPalace_RitualRoom_State_LeftPrisonersRot {52cc991c-1d18-4d84-ab28-61e21ac958b5} = True

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 03b86425-652e-7e85-2f15-842817b0a4a9Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h0bec08cag6239g44d4g8f6cga86ba9a3917cText UUID: a011a41d-2f61-483b-9784-46c55e2c2812Show Once: True
                                  • +
                                    40.Astarion: Gods. Well, maybe it's for the best. I don't know if killing them feels right, but freeing them? I'm not sure the world is ready to have seven thousand hungry spawn unleashed on it.

                                    Text

                                    Gods. Well, maybe it's for the best. I don't know if killing them feels right, but freeing them? I'm not sure the world is ready to have seven thousand hungry spawn unleashed on it.
                                    h2d0194b6g5d99g4484gb24egb6d7fe19d471 | 9ee1c057-10ab-48fc-a4e9-2f0b4bc7d766 | stub

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0a31ec04-479d-f39d-b5b1-460c2b7a4274Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h2d0194b6g5d99g4484gb24egb6d7fe19d471Text UUID: 9ee1c057-10ab-48fc-a4e9-2f0b4bc7d766Timeline Phase Index: 202Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0a31ec04-479d-f39d-b5b1-460c2b7a4274Timeline Phase Duration: 15sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                                    • See Node 835 (Astarion) Still, this will take some getting used to - Cazador being... gone.
                                • +
                                  655.Player: I left them in the care of some monster hunters. They were waiting when I left.

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: bc024c44-8b4b-ba9d-e5bb-af44be1a22baSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h8bc359d3gc0e5g4175g89edg3be5838f4232Text UUID: c7b4a4c4-0837-4da0-aa34-a231959a28ebShow Once: True
                                  • +
                                    59.Astarion: Gods help them. But perhaps they'll find some kind of peace at the end of all this.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0f2fad8f-6600-a0b2-764c-bcd0d615c0c1Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h12aab49cg5ca1g4d51g9214ge5535759045eText UUID: 7e67f7d1-8125-4c57-a699-52df7d1c92d0Timeline Phase Index: 214Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0f2fad8f-6600-a0b2-764c-bcd0d615c0c1Timeline Phase Duration: 8.43sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                    • See Node 835 (Astarion) Still, this will take some getting used to - Cazador being... gone.
                                • +
                                  15.Player: What would you have liked me to do?

                                  Metadata

                                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 049bd991-cef5-812c-9f76-f689ae9d0ce5Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h201cc594g02c1g4b81g8f1cgd14827ab7591Text UUID: 838b22cb-1ca3-49fc-8226-c9662fcfd431Show Once: True
                                  • +
                                    391.Astarion: I don't know. I don't know what I would have done - what I could have done, even.

                                    Metadata

                                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 720c80f7-bc7b-b1dd-bfd1-ec1588ff3f85Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h5389280dg2207g4677ga1eagb746f487452fText UUID: a34a592e-252c-4b9a-a10c-859719d8c123Timeline Phase Index: 266Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 720c80f7-bc7b-b1dd-bfd1-ec1588ff3f85Timeline Phase Duration: 8.64sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                                    • •
                                      764.Astarion: Just - I just need some space. I'm sure this will all start to sink in soon. [End]

                  733.Player: Yes. No one should have that much power.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d74b23dd-3dee-6e2d-8ab0-d87ea10708f2Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hdaa8d55bgbf5bg4033gb1f3g01566606e9ccText UUID: f20862c6-24e9-4e89-a176-60c96ac7ef88Show Once: True
                  • +
                    496.Astarion: I could have had that much power! I could have walked in the sun!

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 955ee46f-b1ff-1d9d-3885-1c989b25bbb6Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hf4d9fce5gf9eeg40fbgbb01g2cdfe74e691dText UUID: 5a7af213-fafd-49e3-9c6f-21b79b2ce65fTimeline Phase Index: 94Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 955ee46f-b1ff-1d9d-3885-1c989b25bbb6Timeline Phase Duration: 4.87sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                    • +
                      616.Astarion: And now you have the gall to stand here and announce that you've doomed me to this life forever.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b37284d3-6d52-b355-b767-72f11e3f396dSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hb21dcee3g889eg4eb8g988dg3188972c7fd9Text UUID: 04871694-8d37-4a6b-b4c6-8b6deaa7615fTimeline Phase Index: 139Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b37284d3-6d52-b355-b767-72f11e3f396dTimeline Phase Duration: 7.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                      • +
                        196.Player: Your life will be whatever you make it, so focus on making it a good one.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 353fd7bf-9e8d-375b-9abb-71ce67ca3a35Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd3d74dfbg73d4g4a48gb6d1gf62cc0311f64Text UUID: e612a2d5-52eb-4559-9532-f6535e938438Show Once: True
                        • +
                          849.Astarion: Easy to say when you're not the one facing a lifetime of hunger in the shadows.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fc800d53-8a58-18d9-75fc-467cbf4fe06bSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h19fc8dcag9eeeg430egab3dgaf55cb3f6398Text UUID: 6db7fbbc-0091-4e06-9620-cdcbb3b6b7f9Timeline Phase Index: 124Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fc800d53-8a58-18d9-75fc-467cbf4fe06bTimeline Phase Duration: 6.96sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                          • +
                            479.Astarion: Whatever your fears, this is my life. It should have been my choice, and you should have trusted me to make it.

                            Metadata

                            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8f8669c6-1e6c-c347-20ee-18dd56028347Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: he69784aag88e5g4732gb92cgcf2346e189cdText UUID: 4321c22e-8bbb-4b9c-9bb4-a0c713379fbaTimeline Phase Index: 88Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8f8669c6-1e6c-c347-20ee-18dd56028347Timeline Phase Duration: 16sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                            • +
                              606.Astarion: We've come so far together, we may as well see this tadpole business through to the end. But once that's done, we're done.Approval_AtLeast_-40_For_Sp2

                              Flags and Tags

                                588.Astarion: If I were in a position to, I'd leave you here and now. Lucky for you, I'll have to stick around a little longer. [End]GLO_Companion_LeaveBlocked

                                Flags and Tags

                                checktype Object | speaker 0 Astarion

                              • •
                                794.Astarion: You can deal with the tadpole yourself. I'm done with you. [End]GLO_Companion_Leave

                      • +
                        502.Player: I did what I thought was right. I won't apologise for that.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 9699dd17-f02b-7664-588a-6f0293a37cfaSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h48207e47gf96dg4b9dg9338g148c47967a92Text UUID: a6b9c722-081e-4498-9678-d5cf720eef31Show Once: True
                        • See Node 479 (Astarion) Whatever your fears, this is my life. It should have been my choice, and you should have trusted me to make it.
                      • +
                        339.Player: You're being dramatic.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5fc56f1f-59e5-74a1-e837-a49cc094bb2bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h6dc79024gcc01g4947gbd1cgdb565cfb4454Text UUID: 2ccd277d-a309-4386-8a82-c799d6841aafShow Once: True
                        • +
                          661.Astarion: I had a chance to live forever in the sun. To be free of the hunger that wracks me day and night.

                          Metadata

                          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bebb437f-da18-6ff9-412b-1b826d4a5dfaSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h9a4345ddga754g4a45gaef8g58ea15716b28Text UUID: 33b8093e-3012-4cbb-9857-a75ad62a2aefTimeline Phase Index: 165Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bebb437f-da18-6ff9-412b-1b826d4a5dfaTimeline Phase Duration: 12.16sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                          • See Node 479 (Astarion) Whatever your fears, this is my life. It should have been my choice, and you should have trusted me to make it.
                      • +

                        Metadata

                        • +

        451.Astarion: It's not a plan yet - more a feeling. Just an itch at the back of my mind, but I know I'm missing something.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 85771049-57b7-500b-6d54-2b7f0f93f2e7Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h88d7eca5gc316g4cf6g8533gd115cf497479Text UUID: b1cd409d-57ff-4f06-ae64-367373df87d4Timeline Phase Index: 166Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 85771049-57b7-500b-6d54-2b7f0f93f2e7Timeline Phase Duration: 33.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 85771049-57b7-500b-6d54-2b7f0f93f2e7Group Index: 0
        • +
          549.Astarion: Whatever Cazador did to me, it was more than his usual sadism: it had purpose.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a311c05f-d346-de2b-d226-14bb3c4bad72Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h537df51bg3bacg4934g8d6dg77645271bf48Text UUID: c38536d1-971d-4e4d-9cdc-0ffe8038b29dGroup ID: 85771049-57b7-500b-6d54-2b7f0f93f2e7Group Index: 1
          • +
            414.Astarion: Once I know what that purpose was, maybe a plan will present itself. But for now I just need to scratch this itch.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 78b8cee6-1ab1-49dc-96fc-0918ae0afc27Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h7ee3fbc4g8bb1g43abgab5cg3b585913925fText UUID: aae667aa-c360-4db4-a4e0-d330e42691e9Group ID: 85771049-57b7-500b-6d54-2b7f0f93f2e7Group Index: 2

                    • ORI_Astarion_State_PartySawScars {32bbdc0b-6c04-2db1-75ce-df811a8646e9} = False

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e8c3e2df-d703-9334-4a10-f7260f9029d5Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hce043bccgcbc4g4162gb758g48565b9bee77Text UUID: dc025e25-c1f3-4ec6-80d2-d7c39196bf22Timeline Phase Index: 141Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e8c3e2df-d703-9334-4a10-f7260f9029d5Timeline Phase Duration: 38.99sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: e8c3e2df-d703-9334-4a10-f7260f9029d5Group Index: 0
                    • +
                      665.Astarion: He carved them into my back over one long night, saying it was a poem. But it's more than that, I'm sure.

                      Metadata

                      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bfa0dda9-38bd-e022-85b3-b05998005c2dSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h152b416eg902bg4b95ga7cag6a9e6da4f310Text UUID: 518acf11-2436-4077-a24f-2f78f645d73cGroup ID: e8c3e2df-d703-9334-4a10-f7260f9029d5Group Index: 1
                      • +
                        625.Astarion: Whatever he wrote, he wrote it in Infernal. And if anyone can reveal infernal secrets - Raphael can. That's why we have to do as he asks.

                        Metadata

                        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b5dc1b4b-1101-fcf9-34b5-9e703d3c08afSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h143e5e5cg63a5g457bg9f1bgb56d9f38be02Text UUID: e6be0e77-58aa-46ef-ae3c-b90f0b66feadGroup ID: e8c3e2df-d703-9334-4a10-f7260f9029d5Group Index: 2
                        • See Node 679 Jump to Node 19
          • +
            362.Player: Why does it matter? We can't trust him.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 69b3acab-e6d5-d29e-c2f9-e35eafd8e067Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h79f5c44cgde64g457cgb916g9e12627f4a70Text UUID: 076658e6-4338-4cf6-9ecd-c0a5d0073f3fShow Once: True
            • +
              231.Astarion: He doesn't have to be trustworthy to be useful. None of us do.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3e4b5c05-a943-2bf8-d140-5882373cf5d2Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h337af94eg3e79g4a99g959cgffeb49cbcad0Text UUID: b4c0753f-437b-410e-a4eb-314fb8b2b466Timeline Phase Index: 288Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3e4b5c05-a943-2bf8-d140-5882373cf5d2Timeline Phase Duration: 6.1sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
              • See Node 768 (Astarion) Perhaps if we help him, I can still salvage something from this. He would owe us, after all...
          • +
            701.Player: Nothing worth repeating.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: cc6f5cfe-df1c-7f3f-4703-f3d1f47c5cbbSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h981dd6d8g1c7bg40c2gb1eag599f6a437652Text UUID: 703b5f5d-18b2-4d85-80b4-490bd9511e31Show Once: True
            • +
              287.Astarion: Not to you, maybe, but it's important to me.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 53ad6537-af39-5915-fa12-469891567c49Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h10229852gde9ag43f4g8305g9d3f0166d151Text UUID: f30bff83-4e7f-42f3-8289-0094f013abb8Timeline Phase Index: 299Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 53ad6537-af39-5915-fa12-469891567c49Timeline Phase Duration: 5.69sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
              • See Node 768 (Astarion) Perhaps if we help him, I can still salvage something from this. He would owe us, after all...
    • +
      836.Player: Are you worried about Cazador finding out you're back?VISITEDREGION_BGO_Main_A!OR_Astarion_State_PreRitualSceneEndedORI_Astarion_State_DiscussedCazadorAfterSCL!Astarion_InParty_Asked_InWyrmsCrossingAstarion_InParty_Asked_InWyrmsCrossing

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global
      • VISITEDREGION_BGO_Main_A {40f06537-814f-4796-b012-5ffaa648a8d9} = True
      • OR_Astarion_State_PreRitualSceneEnded {8e60ef2f-d3cc-49b2-a552-70a545caceed} = False
      • ORI_Astarion_State_DiscussedCazadorAfterSCL {1d23b665-e2c1-4d61-9c53-25aff637529f} = True
      checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
      • Astarion_InParty_Asked_InWyrmsCrossing {e9b43909-7e55-72a0-a872-7b03a8785ac8} = False
      settype Object | speaker 1 Player
      • Astarion_InParty_Asked_InWyrmsCrossing {e9b43909-7e55-72a0-a872-7b03a8785ac8} = True

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f92af30d-48ca-076c-9e51-09d14997ac26Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hff387faeg3c92g4ac5g96c5gaeda825446f4Text UUID: 61d1eab3-2584-4ad5-9293-ab9fc543df47Show Once: True
      • +
        752.Astarion: I won't lie, the thought hardly fills me with glee. Even with my new-found advantages, he's still an incredibly powerful vampire.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: dc4a64f0-da6f-f96b-174f-b4c995ce545cSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h1db0967ag10b9g46e4g9b9cg23691bd86b59Text UUID: e332140f-129f-41fd-8b14-fc237c005624Timeline Phase Index: 90Timeline Dialog Node UUID: dc4a64f0-da6f-f96b-174f-b4c995ce545cTimeline Phase Duration: 23.51sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: dc4a64f0-da6f-f96b-174f-b4c995ce545cGroup Index: 0
        • +
          486.Astarion: But he's arrogant too. If he does hear I'm back, he'll try to take me and expose himself in the process. Then I'll be able to strike.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9178d745-16c4-20c4-4ea5-f6d81d2784a9Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h02ae46e9g127dg4d3bg828fg1c5b94e04ad7Text UUID: cef06a2d-1d06-4a53-86ee-6554d3a05238Group ID: dc4a64f0-da6f-f96b-174f-b4c995ce545cGroup Index: 1
          • +
            192.Player: It sounds risky.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 34404522-96d9-e489-9fb8-503c076cd69fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h3169401fg1741g475dg9683g2fd8e8844bb2Text UUID: 3a0b160a-337e-4408-abde-0a295aa8b674Show Once: True
            • +
              605.Astarion: It's something of a gamble, true, but if I can win - if I can beat him, it would be worth any risk.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b00bd5ef-dc6e-50ad-84e0-07f86f3da2c1Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h9af7a0d7gcd8dg4734gb83fg52889bc24efeText UUID: a00e5318-df2a-4b6a-b63d-8d38e1b4d0c7Timeline Phase Index: 102Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b00bd5ef-dc6e-50ad-84e0-07f86f3da2c1Timeline Phase Duration: 23.01sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Group ID: b00bd5ef-dc6e-50ad-84e0-07f86f3da2c1Group Index: 0
              • +
                721.Astarion: So yes, I do worry about facing him. But if we can get his attention, finding the ritual's location will be much easier, and that could give me the edge I need.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d3434ff2-047d-557a-ca58-e3875ec6f62cSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h785c1b41gf32bg4adeg85c4g0f32a04ff1ecText UUID: 3381fff9-9feb-4124-984c-a331df932a05Group ID: b00bd5ef-dc6e-50ad-84e0-07f86f3da2c1Group Index: 1
                • •
                  480.Jump to Node 19

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: JumpUUID: 8ffd8187-246b-7f87-2b4f-d7328ae7f653Jump Target: Node 19 (05b247e0-98eb-4dbe-881e-7f4fa622af86)Jump Target Point: 2
          • +
            207.Player: And how will you 'strike' exactly? He won't be alone.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 37e6dc0f-ad0c-0230-9a16-f2fe6818b386Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h9004a730g2e47g4d7dg92b4gc1b522f2f27fText UUID: 6e634807-ad79-4b6d-9f71-ff56adb9c133Show Once: True
            • +
              648.Astarion: Neither will I, darling. At least I hope you'll come along for the show?

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bb693bca-c859-594f-0dac-90a3f259ddfdSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h4e059e43gb064g4601gb252g03a545365387Text UUID: d2dbc3b5-c7f6-4840-80c9-a1d77ac58bb1Timeline Phase Index: 70Timeline Dialog Node UUID: bb693bca-c859-594f-0dac-90a3f259ddfdTimeline Phase Duration: 20sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: bb693bca-c859-594f-0dac-90a3f259ddfdGroup Index: 0
              • +
                551.Astarion: But regardless, the plan is simple - find him, stop him from gaining almighty power, and then really enjoy killing him.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a3910917-0f6d-7896-2899-745d0771abd7Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h62cd4ec8g9076g4755ga541g5d97ac2decc0Text UUID: 0f5f86dd-3ca6-43cd-8b80-439bfbda9cf3Group ID: bb693bca-c859-594f-0dac-90a3f259ddfdGroup Index: 1
                • +
                  1.Astarion: And if I can seize that almighty power for myself? Well, all the better.ORI_Astarion_Act3_WantsRitualComplete

                  Flags and Tags

                  checktype Global
                  • ORI_Astarion_Act3_WantsRitualComplete {f8fe5822-acad-d162-33ed-c32b1dfca608} = True

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0022269c-8eb4-7117-4185-0a5c0852dcc0Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hc5da5dc3g7edag460egb22dgbbbd1a3ed1dcText UUID: 8d78b2b2-2d7e-44f6-be0a-1f14c373f779Timeline Phase Index: 103Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0022269c-8eb4-7117-4185-0a5c0852dcc0Timeline Phase Duration: 9sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Optional: True
                  • See Node 480 Jump to Node 19
          • +
            149.Player: You really think you can beat him?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2774c271-bb53-616e-398f-a038cd04c1afSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h036402bbgd2c2g4eb0g9baagdd696a7597edText UUID: 70cda429-f8b4-4048-a538-bdf3478b01c3Show Once: True
            • •

              Metadata

    • +
      576.Player: So you unlocked the Necromancy of Thay. Did you find what you were looking for?LOW_SorcerousSundries_State_LastPageThayReadFOR_DangerousBook_Event_GaveBookToAstarion!Astarion_InParty_Asked_FinishedNecromanyOfThayAstarion_InParty_Asked_FinishedNecromanyOfThay

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global
