      • FOR_DangerousBook_Event_GaveBookToAstarion {515dfe15-a9d3-5ae1-ef78-ba82a37e7d70} = True
      checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
      • Astarion_InParty_Asked_FinishedNecromanyOfThay {7575406b-bb6b-eacd-cd7a-6b88ec2f6e74} = False
      settype Object | speaker 1 Player
      • Astarion_InParty_Asked_FinishedNecromanyOfThay {7575406b-bb6b-eacd-cd7a-6b88ec2f6e74} = True

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a918627a-ea93-086a-57f1-9b5fae5388d8Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5f65ed9dg92d7g4ebaga030g805cc0919eeeText UUID: 3cf79f3e-48cf-4de2-a02b-1770f263eebeShow Once: True
      • +
        587.Astarion: Yes? No? I'm not sure.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: abd0005b-0f06-82d3-4264-41c0cd358eacSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h1427e539gcc9ag4e6egac66g35fa9aa974a7Text UUID: 88504495-13c4-40b1-8e84-d105790a77c2Timeline Phase Index: 63Timeline Dialog Node UUID: abd0005b-0f06-82d3-4264-41c0cd358eacTimeline Phase Duration: 5sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
        • +
          848.Astarion: It is full of terrible secrets, including Cazador's bloody 'Rite of Profane Ascension', but it told me nothing new.ORI_Astarion_Knows_RitualsPurpose

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Global
          • ORI_Astarion_Knows_RitualsPurpose {d1dc0f8a-b77d-4e40-a501-a66e163b8376} = True

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fc1add06-8b8c-3e18-8d5d-d40e8eb6671cSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h1590b133geb4dg4b0egadf0ga88c9ebaed5bText UUID: 9621e41e-a67f-46bd-990a-f11c0dbaff2cTimeline Phase Index: 156Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fc1add06-8b8c-3e18-8d5d-d40e8eb6671cTimeline Phase Duration: 18sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: fc1add06-8b8c-3e18-8d5d-d40e8eb6671cGroup Index: 0
          • +
            688.Astarion: Then again, it was filled with otherworldly power. Which I am more than happy to wield to my advantage.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c7a21552-f63c-58a8-7336-113a73444aadSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: he975a3e7gf536g4632g86bdgae816e0c24cbText UUID: 0a278a0a-79a4-4e32-803a-d636485531d0Group ID: fc1add06-8b8c-3e18-8d5d-d40e8eb6671cGroup Index: 1
            • See Node 480 Jump to Node 19
        • +
          420.Astarion: I was hoping for something that would let me escape whatever fate Cazador had planned for me. Instead, I found the Rite of Profane Ascension.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7a325733-be27-22f9-f599-0bda5c69cfa3Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h17d4e7b9gbda2g4637ga333ge1869879a2c7Text UUID: 7406529a-b178-454e-9f95-9974a0c30fd6Timeline Phase Index: 325Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7a325733-be27-22f9-f599-0bda5c69cfa3Timeline Phase Duration: 53.26sTimeline Phase Shots: 5Group ID: 7a325733-be27-22f9-f599-0bda5c69cfa3Group Index: 0
          • +
            697.Astarion: It grants my kind the freedom to walk in the sun, be free of our hunger, and accrue all manner of powers.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cbcd9cbf-1717-c554-c0ac-3b668b91b1ebSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: he6a4f4ddg84d5g477dgbb74g31000351c1eeText UUID: 1e0c1346-9a37-41fd-a6e2-b63fd3e57788Group ID: 7a325733-be27-22f9-f599-0bda5c69cfa3Group Index: 1
            • +
              245.Astarion: All it requires is the sacrifice of a few souls. Souls by scars that look exactly like mine.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 43751db0-512a-562b-9b78-970489f17e5bSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h67e60291gdf8dg45dag8ba0gf65a363d4717Text UUID: 862eb5e0-9370-4276-9e9d-605a10d2cb40Group ID: 7a325733-be27-22f9-f599-0bda5c69cfa3Group Index: 2
              • +
                380.Astarion: This rite - it's been Cazador's plan the whole time. He's going to sacrifice me and who knows how many others so he can 'ascend' to all this power.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6e0e731f-cd0d-9fec-463e-c146930e94b7Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hd67d1829g7711g41b8g81c6g9020b4911fa3Text UUID: a013a00c-c51f-4736-a409-24a35198c015Group ID: 7a325733-be27-22f9-f599-0bda5c69cfa3Group Index: 3
                • •
                  318.Astarion: I'm sorry, I... I might need a moment. This is a lot to take in... [End]

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5a9616c4-b890-b5cc-5467-54fb8a57fb59Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h3b790ec6g0193g4b6egaa6agf2c98cd554ccText UUID: 97836de4-0563-4dd7-b86f-9c59ef64c123End Node: TrueGroup ID: 7a325733-be27-22f9-f599-0bda5c69cfa3Group Index: 4
    • +
      405.Player: I wanted to ask about Cazador's ritual. You must be thinking about it?ORI_Astarion_State_TwoDaysPassedAfterRaphaelToldRitual!OR_Astarion_State_PreRitualSceneEnded!Astarion_InParty_Asked_ThoughtsOnRitualAstarion_InParty_Asked_ThoughtsOnRitual

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global
      • ORI_Astarion_State_TwoDaysPassedAfterRaphaelToldRitual {11e1d367-03a8-421c-9618-9e8e9f654514} = True
      • OR_Astarion_State_PreRitualSceneEnded {8e60ef2f-d3cc-49b2-a552-70a545caceed} = False
      checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
      • Astarion_InParty_Asked_ThoughtsOnRitual {289be262-b8e6-7cfa-deb4-eb4ba233d28f} = False
      settype Object | speaker 1 Player
      • Astarion_InParty_Asked_ThoughtsOnRitual {289be262-b8e6-7cfa-deb4-eb4ba233d28f} = True

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7633d2bd-33fc-7232-920c-cea4b154e2e9Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h766efe04g05ccg4253gbfb0g3f831bd6ad1fText UUID: 8ccacae0-d2a9-4398-84d0-793aee4c6703Show Once: True
      • +
        77.Astarion: The thing that will decide my fate forevermore? Yes, it has been on my mind - why?

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 129b3145-f81a-7517-eb01-4d712236b6cbSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hc769d80fgf516g450ag8ce1gca6f072edcdeText UUID: 648b51e0-4643-4b3b-881d-1fecd5e75501Timeline Phase Index: 205Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 129b3145-f81a-7517-eb01-4d712236b6cbTimeline Phase Duration: 8sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
        • +
          564.Player: Do you think we can stop it?

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a6550fa3-d9bb-2f8f-3cc6-854f8cc6df17Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h317cdbe7g857cg4ef1gbe26g11629db7b2d8Text UUID: f32222ab-3f5c-4ae2-a5c5-3b94d5f534a5Show Once: True
          • +
            248.Astarion: Well, in theory it's simple: destroy Cazador, stop ritual. That's assuming we want to stop the ritual...

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 44c53911-b4ac-7a8b-b414-5f8e3da9cc1eSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h4c70c522gccb1g4022ga596ge5ad0174ffeeText UUID: 9b9bddb6-951e-4fa9-a22f-2dca2950b0ebTimeline Phase Index: 281Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 44c53911-b4ac-7a8b-b414-5f8e3da9cc1eTimeline Phase Duration: 11.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
            • +
              82.Astarion: What? I've obviously thought about it! If I was the one who completed the ritual, I'd have such power. And I could walk in the sun without fear I'd turn into a mind flayer.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 14030f69-af85-5e31-920c-a689a49038ebSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: ha88f1651gb6dag4937g87f2g06e35966f00bText UUID: 8338fcf7-2c9a-4d3c-9942-ec3da2c8988dTimeline Phase Index: 220Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 14030f69-af85-5e31-920c-a689a49038ebTimeline Phase Duration: 14.5sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
              • +
                715.Player: I don't think you should do it.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d1d72855-7b34-60d6-3dfa-189e8bd287b4Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4c266292g0ef3g47f2g816ag943ad0c06f10Text UUID: e53814f3-5557-4e9f-bf5a-dfb850e51402Show Once: True
                • +
                  749.Astarion: A pity then, that it's not your decision to make.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: db29b278-6776-6d6a-0b19-7d2d52e26844Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h264c21caga14fg45a8g942fg1432229d5282Text UUID: 5118d5b5-1327-497b-a6ed-d3f452bb26deTimeline Phase Index: 135Timeline Dialog Node UUID: db29b278-6776-6d6a-0b19-7d2d52e26844Timeline Phase Duration: 4.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • +
                    137.Astarion: Of course, I don't even know if I could complete the ritual. It may be impossible - but it certainly is tempting.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 24b3f1e2-a7da-252d-14b6-9b90cdf7fa1fSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h60f6c8abg03a3g4c11g9ce4gd1719b67021dText UUID: 8d867f4f-c6c6-402e-a46f-08a2b408f8a1Timeline Phase Index: 201Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 24b3f1e2-a7da-252d-14b6-9b90cdf7fa1fTimeline Phase Duration: 9.49sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                    • See Node 480 Jump to Node 19
              • +
                131.Player: Naturally - who wouldn't be tempted?

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 243f8d14-1700-07a0-d8a5-d597c41183e0Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h631e6744gced9g4fe0g971eg413c4b63fc9dText UUID: 205c8fc5-df4d-417c-ab2e-80cda05d9ef7Show Once: True
                • See Node 137 (Astarion) Of course, I don't even know if I could complete the ritual. It may be impossible - but it certainly is tempting.
              • +
                283.Player: And the souls that need to be sacrificed?

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 52319133-ac0d-a2da-f6fc-ee9bbe9abf56Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h63f8bb5bge73eg4f5cga2b5g8b1cc23d818bText UUID: 873895f7-8417-447e-bac0-5d2f9cc87de0Show Once: True
                • +
                  165.Astarion: I don't relish it, but my siblings lured thousands of people to their deaths over the years. I doubt Baldur's Gate would miss them.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2be71de6-31c1-ccf8-525f-6cc4401d3213Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h8460a04eg922dg4f3bgb5afg5eae8ed27daaText UUID: e5d1c6ad-e5c8-40cd-80b3-350d79d99525Timeline Phase Index: 182Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2be71de6-31c1-ccf8-525f-6cc4401d3213Timeline Phase Duration: 11.13sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
                  • See Node 137 (Astarion) Of course, I don't even know if I could complete the ritual. It may be impossible - but it certainly is tempting.
        • +
          106.Player: I just want to know what your intentions are.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 1a165ae9-1a13-b9b8-4e84-5310c3d5ea8bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h070992e5gaee6g433fgbe98gdcf6a7a0838dText UUID: d2efac1b-e5af-434a-a88b-4ef0b5d521a7Show Once: True
          • +
            677.Astarion: I hadn't really decided on the specifics. Obviously we could stop the ritual, or... not?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c45bfef0-a0e1-704f-821b-c2e50875398eSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hdc60d40bgf7adg4fd1g8331gd538eec7e1f1Text UUID: 28bc41bc-8827-45df-a374-883c6498bf2dTimeline Phase Index: 155Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c45bfef0-a0e1-704f-821b-c2e50875398eTimeline Phase Duration: 9sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
            • See Node 82 (Astarion) What? I've obviously thought about it! If I was the one who completed the ritual, I'd have such power. And I could walk in the sun without fear I'd turn into a mind flayer.
        • +
          537.Player: All that power - you must be tempted to take it for yourself.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 9fb79e82-fcae-baf1-c6fe-4362747e9970Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h65ef5fd1gcfe7g454egab4dgf95a8f7c3772Text UUID: 56619edd-fb18-4723-a57e-ea9cc1ff829dShow Once: True
          • +
            397.Astarion: Well, of course I've thought about it. If I completed the ritual instead of Cazador, I'd get all that power. And I could walk in the sun without fear I'd turn into a mind flayer.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 735c2791-e29a-ad1b-3b5c-48b4de185fe8Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h949ad1f2ge9f0g438cg9856g922ffa616b2bText UUID: 1a1f52d8-6c8a-44ef-b662-05a47cfcaf3bTimeline Phase Index: 262Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 735c2791-e29a-ad1b-3b5c-48b4de185fe8Timeline Phase Duration: 13sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
            • •

    • +
      163.Player: I never asked - are you Cazador's only spawn? Or are there others like you?!CAMP_VampireAmbush_State_AmbushStarted!WYR_VampireSpawns_State_IntroHappened!OR_Astarion_State_PreRitualSceneEnded!ORI_Astarion_State_DiscussedCazadorAfterSCLTWN_State_EverEnteredBefore+2 moreAstarion_InParty_Asked_OtherSpawn

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2b1a0d04-0fb3-0c12-fd77-0e459df449eaSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5e0c7cbeg2612g4f03gbbebgefd75822dc85Text UUID: 75f8dcae-e8dc-49ef-84cc-94f37e049744Show Once: True
      • +
        321.Astarion: Cazador sired seven spawn - me and my six 'brothers and sisters'.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5b0d4fbb-30a4-72e3-c84a-92f439c8f28cSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hb483e32dgc0e4g42a8gb8a3gd917cd2cc9afText UUID: c232c5cf-3984-4bf4-b789-1559d2c00ebeTimeline Phase Index: 251Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5b0d4fbb-30a4-72e3-c84a-92f439c8f28cTimeline Phase Duration: 7.51sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
        • +
          783.Astarion: He always insisted we were a family - even when he was carving scars into our flesh.ORI_Astarion_State_PartySawScars

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Global
          • ORI_Astarion_State_PartySawScars {32bbdc0b-6c04-2db1-75ce-df811a8646e9} = True

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e665d6c7-13c9-5bb6-34ac-91598bb961ffSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h1fe12884g251dg4fcdga8edg987f41eab58cText UUID: 1f64c8ef-fbf1-4fa3-8701-b00138e45ef5Timeline Phase Index: 108Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e665d6c7-13c9-5bb6-34ac-91598bb961ffTimeline Phase Duration: 7.66sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Optional: True
          • +
            9.Astarion: I was one of his first, some of the others came years later. He was a monster to us all, but did take special pleasure in my pain. He said my screams sounded sweetest.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 01d38284-82dc-5984-dbf6-e6b6664c47cdSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: habf7a59cg6386g4487gb1ccg23aea4d50abdText UUID: fe59ac02-b5c9-4a70-952d-705b09e2be69Timeline Phase Index: 298Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 01d38284-82dc-5984-dbf6-e6b6664c47cdTimeline Phase Duration: 33.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: 01d38284-82dc-5984-dbf6-e6b6664c47cdGroup Index: 0
            • +
              324.Astarion: And now that I'm gone... I don't know. I pity the other six...

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5c2d3b70-a90d-1f59-71fe-af26a005fe39Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hf4d08ff1gb6a3g4d7eg9dc5gd21e8e4dd4baText UUID: 2af0b5e6-12c1-4412-8cc7-8e9138a6e564Group ID: 01d38284-82dc-5984-dbf6-e6b6664c47cdGroup Index: 1
              • See Node 480 Jump to Node 19
    • +
      10.Player: I spoke to Ulma, the leader of those monster hunters. She wants us to save their children from Cazador.!WYR_GurCamp_State_ToldAstarionAboutQuest!GLO_GurCamp_State_GurLeaderPermaDefeated!LOW_CazadorsPalace_State_EnteredDungeonWYR_GurCamp_State_GotQuestWithoutAstarion!WYR_GurCamp_State_AttackedGur

      Flags and Tags

      checktype Global

      • WYR_GurCamp_State_AttackedGur {6f6d0421-e12e-7a1a-5658-64f85ef6b236} = False

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 02ce8f62-a9e5-90f9-5083-72faad12a406Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h9f77e95egf763g47d1ga1a7g9e28f2472db3Text UUID: 8e1a9344-5225-4689-88f3-e3d95a382445Show Once: True
      • +
        720.Astarion: You spoke to her? Without me? Gods damn it. Of all the hornets' nests to prod, you had to pick that one...

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d3273e1e-c96d-6bd8-cd18-b01abe972a7bSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hbeea123agb9f3g4694gba8fg29899cb874f2Text UUID: 9d3badb3-22c3-426c-b366-62a1e9692f7aTimeline Phase Index: 308Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d3273e1e-c96d-6bd8-cd18-b01abe972a7bTimeline Phase Duration: 25sTimeline Phase Shots: 4Group ID: d3273e1e-c96d-6bd8-cd18-b01abe972a7bGroup Index: 0
        • +
          284.Astarion: Whatever you told them, it's pointless. Cazador does not have a drop of mercy in his fetid body - their children are long dead.WYR_GurCamp_State_ToldAstarionAboutQuest

          Flags and Tags

          settype Global
          • WYR_GurCamp_State_ToldAstarionAboutQuest {3f0cdc7b-4b11-42d0-a31e-c2bff7fad550} = True

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 526681c1-1d6e-41d8-08dd-eab3f1179ff4Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hda83d145g6a34g4825g8594gc0ea460d7694Text UUID: 01e9f5c1-788c-4434-a393-e51883c14f08Group ID: d3273e1e-c96d-6bd8-cd18-b01abe972a7bGroup Index: 1
          • +
            602.Player: That may be true, but we need to try.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: aecc64dc-b1b3-f41b-73ef-22019b7b90e6Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc48646ecg6887g4a7ag81eegd46a4e6b9b1cText UUID: 53f1397a-c1a9-4413-93d3-fc892e908325Show Once: True
            • +
              436.Astarion: Are you not listening to me? You can't help them - their children are gone.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 80f3eaf6-7994-d744-495d-f92b7e723dacSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h8049aa8eg2c95g4ae5gb178g2919b439dd3fText UUID: 8827af69-3cf5-4f7a-be21-85dac6c5fed7Timeline Phase Index: 292Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 80f3eaf6-7994-d744-495d-f92b7e723dacTimeline Phase Duration: 20sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Group ID: 80f3eaf6-7994-d744-495d-f92b7e723dacGroup Index: 0
              • +
                265.Astarion: If you want to waste your time chasing ghosts, fine. But once we find their little tykes' corpses, you can deliver the news. While I am far, far away.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4c6b8027-198d-79e5-66cc-d7a998ad222bSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h4d0f9cfdg261dg484fg95f6g5329c8eb12dcText UUID: 947d0cb0-ff68-433a-aaa2-06ffcc624bb3Group ID: 80f3eaf6-7994-d744-495d-f92b7e723dacGroup Index: 1
                • •
                  225.Jump to Node 19

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: JumpUUID: 3d864124-3058-07df-83ce-d1b1edf53da5Jump Target: Node 19 (05b247e0-98eb-4dbe-881e-7f4fa622af86)Jump Target Point: 2
          • +
            447.Player: If you won't help them, I will.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 841af0cb-b410-dd45-bba2-28f0f82b23e9Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h901d6c40g2e5ag4b91ga264g0f8abbc03c29Text UUID: 65eabcb4-8234-4eed-b644-250cd31fb9c2Show Once: True
            • See Node 436 (Astarion) Are you not listening to me? You can't help them - their children are gone.
          • +
            409.Player: You owe them, Astarion. If we can't get their children, at least we can get revenge.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 771bc529-6e83-0279-e632-78e68d26546bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h2d856275g223cg4f34gaa08gc9dec406db4fText UUID: 7656bb6d-5459-4a24-92db-91544966ce96Show Once: True
            • +
              275.Astarion: Well... look, I'm not opposed to revenge, but on my terms. For my reasons - not because of some lost whelps.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4f96d8b2-ca28-4187-1cf3-970b84300d5eSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h0b839f41g6da4g4250g817cg76a5d65ad4daText UUID: f4d156cd-6505-4a99-bca7-f3c801a73b35Timeline Phase Index: 306Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4f96d8b2-ca28-4187-1cf3-970b84300d5eTimeline Phase Duration: 13sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
              • +
                590.Astarion: Of course if we stumble across their little corpses, you're very welcome to report back to your new friends. But I will not be delivering that news.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ac2362c7-e530-5eb3-0377-4b80ce1f059aSpeaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: hc84b98c2g8143g41e8gb9a4gc1f042a9c65eText UUID: b0f36ad4-c80d-4b66-afd8-0618385fc9c0Timeline Phase Index: 62Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ac2362c7-e530-5eb3-0377-4b80ce1f059aTimeline Phase Duration: 12sTimeline Phase Shots: 2
                • See Node 225 Jump to Node 19
          • +
            758.Player: Nevermind, then. Let's not waste our time on lost causes.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: dffba617-3143-6557-3320-75be3b542267Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hf18cc057gfffcg457fgac1bge3f32cf02d8bText UUID: 26ded9b1-fcb7-4623-868e-0d9f85fe6ee9Show Once: True
            • +
              20.Astarion: My thoughts exactly. We have our priorities, and none of them as rescuing children.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 05d77181-bcb7-0085-baec-fbdc52272de7Speaker: 0 (Astarion)Text Handle: h7f3a1081g324cg42dcga513gabbe61cf7b4dText UUID: bc20d0d6-7dd9-47d8-9b9c-0578b70f6249Timeline Phase Index: 278Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 05d77181-bcb7-0085-baec-fbdc52272de7Timeline Phase Duration: 9sTimeline Phase Shots: 1
              • See Node 590 (Astarion) Of course if we stumble across their little corpses, you're very welcome to report back to your new friends. But I will not be delivering that news.
